rules.Question: Is there a documented supplier approval procedure before purchasing raw materials?
rules.Requirement Logic: Is there a documented supplier approval procedure before purchasing raw materials?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Weak supplier governance may allow uncontrolled raw material hazards into the facility.
rules.Required Evidence: Approved supplier procedure; approval criteria; supplier list
rules.Corrective Action: Create and approve supplier approval procedure; classify existing suppliers by risk.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If missing, raw material receiving requires HACCP evaluation; possible CCP/OPRP.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M07 Documentation; M08 Traceability; HACCP Receiving
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation. Regulation (EC) No 852/2004: Hygiene of foodstuffs and HACCP-based procedures.
rules.Question_AR: هل يوجد إجراء موثق لاعتماد الموردين قبل شراء المواد الخام؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: أنشئ إجراء موثق لاعتماد الموردين وصنّف الموردين الحاليين حسب مستوى المخاطر.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: ضعف حوكمة الموردين قد يسمح بدخول مخاطر غير خاضعة للرقابة في المواد الخام إلى المنشأة.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Approved supplier procedure; approval criteria; supplier list

rules.Question: Are suppliers risk-classified based on product type, hazard profile, country/region, and history?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are suppliers risk-classified based on product type, hazard profile, country/region, and history?
rules.Hazard / Risk: No risk classification weakens targeted controls for high-risk inputs.
rules.Corrective Action: Classify suppliers as Low/Medium/High and define controls per class.
rules.HACCP Trigger: High-risk suppliers activate intensified receiving controls.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم تصنيف الموردين حسب المخاطر بناءً على نوع المنتج وملف الخطر والدولة والسجل التاريخي؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: صنّف الموردين إلى (منخفض/متوسط/عالي) المخاطر وحدد ضوابط مناسبة لكل فئة.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: غياب تصنيف المخاطر يضعف الضوابط الموجهة للمدخلات عالية الخطورة.

rules.Question: Is each supplier periodically re-evaluated using performance, nonconformance, complaint, and test-result data?
rules.Requirement Logic: Is each supplier periodically re-evaluated using performance, nonconformance, complaint, and test-result data?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unreviewed suppliers may drift into unsafe performance.
rules.Corrective Action: Implement periodic supplier performance review.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated failures may trigger HACCP receiving controls.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم إعادة تقييم كل مورد دورياً باستخدام بيانات الأداء وعدم المطابقة والشكاوى ونتائج الاختبارات؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: طبّق نظام مراجعة دورية لأداء الموردين.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: الموردون غير المراجعون قد ينزلق أداؤهم إلى مستويات غير آمنة.

rules.Question: Are critical suppliers subject to audit or documented remote assessment?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are critical suppliers subject to audit or documented remote assessment?
rules.Hazard / Risk: High-risk supplier controls cannot be verified by paperwork alone.
rules.Required Evidence: Audit report; remote assessment; third-party certificate
rules.Corrective Action: Conduct supplier audit or obtain equivalent verified assessment.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If controls cannot be verified, receiving becomes high risk.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يخضع الموردون الحرجون لتدقيق ميداني أو تقييم موثق عن بُعد؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: أجرِ تدقيقاً ميدانياً على المورد أو احصل على تقييم موثق معادل.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: ضوابط الموردين عالي الخطورة لا يمكن التحقق منها بالوثائق فقط.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Audit report; remote assessment; third-party certificate

rules.Question: Are specifications defined for each raw material, including safety criteria, acceptance/rejection limits, and COA requirements?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are specifications defined for each raw material, including safety criteria, acceptance/rejection limits, and COA requirements?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Undefined specs prevent consistent safety decisions at receiving.
rules.Corrective Action: Create approved specifications and receiving criteria.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If no acceptance limits, receiving cannot reliably control hazards.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation. Regulation (EC) No 852/2004: Hygiene of foodstuffs and HACCP-based procedures.
rules.Question_AR: هل تم تحديد مواصفات لكل مادة خام تشمل معايير السلامة وحدود القبول والرفض ومتطلبات شهادة التحليل (COA)؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: أنشئ مواصفات معتمدة ومعايير استلام لكل مادة خام.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: غياب المواصفات يمنع اتخاذ قرارات سلامة متسقة عند الاستلام.

rules.Question: Are purchase contracts or supplier agreements requiring compliance with food safety requirements?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are purchase contracts or supplier agreements requiring compliance with food safety requirements?
rules.Hazard / Risk: No agreement reduces supplier accountability for safety controls.
rules.Corrective Action: Update contracts with food safety obligations and notification duties.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Weak supplier obligation escalates supplier risk.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل تتضمن عقود الشراء أو اتفاقيات الموردين متطلبات الامتثال لسلامة الغذاء؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: حدّث العقود لتتضمن التزامات سلامة الغذاء وواجبات الإشعار.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: غياب الاتفاقية يقلل من مساءلة المورد على ضوابط السلامة.

rules.Question: Does the supplier notify the facility of changes in process, source, feed, treatment, pesticide, or production conditions?
rules.Requirement Logic: Does the supplier notify the facility of changes in process, source, feed, treatment, pesticide, or production conditions?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unnotified changes can introduce new hazards.
rules.Corrective Action: Implement supplier change notification and approval.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Uncontrolled change triggers review of hazard analysis.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يُبلّغ المورد المنشأة عن أي تغييرات في العملية أو المصدر أو العلف أو المعالجة أو المبيدات أو ظروف الإنتاج؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: طبّق نظام إشعار وموافقة على تغييرات الموردين.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: التغييرات غير المُبلَّغ عنها قد تُدخل مخاطر جديدة غير متوقعة.

rules.Question: Are non-approved or emergency suppliers controlled through enhanced receiving checks?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are non-approved or emergency suppliers controlled through enhanced receiving checks?
rules.Required Evidence: Emergency supplier approval form; test plan
rules.Corrective Action: Apply temporary approval with mandatory testing and documented release.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Emergency supplier activates receiving HACCP evaluation.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم التحكم في الموردين غير المعتمدين أو الطارئين من خلال فحوصات استلام مشددة؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: طبّق اعتماداً مؤقتاً مع اختبار إلزامي وإطلاق موثق للمواد.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: التوريد الطارئ قد يتجاوز الضوابط المعتادة.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Emergency supplier approval form; test plan

rules.Question: Is the primary production site assessed for environmental contamination risk before approval?
rules.Requirement Logic: Is the primary production site assessed for environmental contamination risk before approval?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Contaminated soil, air, or surrounding industry may introduce chemical contaminants.
rules.Corrective Action: Perform environmental assessment and define controls or disqualify source.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If environmental risk is high and uncontrolled, receiving testing is required.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 Facility; M06 Receiving; HACCP Chemical
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation. Codex CXC 49-2001: Code of Practice concerning source-directed measures to reduce chemical contamination of foods.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم تقييم موقع الإنتاج الأولي (المزرعة) لمخاطر التلوث البيئي قبل الاعتماد؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: أجرِ تقييماً بيئياً وحدد الضوابط المناسبة أو استبعد المصدر.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: التربة أو الهواء الملوث أو الصناعات المحيطة قد تُدخل ملوثات كيميائية.

rules.Question: Are production areas protected from flooding, sewage, wastewater, or runoff contamination?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are production areas protected from flooding, sewage, wastewater, or runoff contamination?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Floodwater or runoff may introduce pathogens, chemicals, or heavy metals.
rules.Corrective Action: Reject source or require mitigation and post-event testing.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Flood event triggers mandatory receiving testing and possible hold.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل تُحمى مناطق الإنتاج من مخاطر الفيضانات والصرف الصحي ومياه الصرف الصناعي والجريان السطحي؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: ارفض المصدر أو اشترط تدابير تخفيف واختبارات ما بعد الحادثة.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: مياه الفيضانات أو الجريان السطحي قد تُدخل مسببات أمراض أو مواد كيميائية أو معادن ثقيلة.

rules.Question: Are nearby industrial, mining, waste, sewage, or pesticide-intensive activities assessed?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are nearby industrial, mining, waste, sewage, or pesticide-intensive activities assessed?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Industrial or agricultural surroundings may increase heavy metal, pesticide, or chemical risks.
rules.Required Evidence: Site risk map; environmental certificates; testing results
rules.Corrective Action: Require site-specific monitoring plan and source verification.
rules.HACCP Trigger: High-risk surroundings trigger chemical testing at receiving.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 49-2001: Code of Practice concerning source-directed measures to reduce chemical contamination of foods.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم تقييم الأنشطة الصناعية والتعدين والنفايات ومحطات الصرف ومزارع المبيدات المجاورة؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: اشترط خطة رصد خاصة بالموقع والتحقق من المصدر.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: المحيط الصناعي أو الزراعي قد يزيد من مخاطر المعادن الثقيلة والمبيدات والمواد الكيميائية.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Site risk map; environmental certificates; testing results

rules.Question: Is irrigation, washing, or animal drinking water controlled for microbiological and chemical safety?
rules.Requirement Logic: Is irrigation, washing, or animal drinking water controlled for microbiological and chemical safety?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unsafe water may contaminate raw materials directly.
rules.Required Evidence: Water testing results; water source approval
rules.Corrective Action: Require water testing and source control; hold/reject if unsafe.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unsafe water triggers receiving test/hold and HACCP review.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم ضبط مياه الري والغسيل وشرب الحيوانات من حيث السلامة الميكروبيولوجية والكيميائية؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: اشترط اختبار المياه وضبط المصدر؛ أوقف المواد أو ارفضها إذا كانت غير آمنة.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: المياه غير الآمنة قد تلوث المواد الخام مباشرة.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Water testing results; water source approval

rules.Question: Are agricultural inputs such as fertilizers, manure, and soil amendments controlled?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are agricultural inputs such as fertilizers, manure, and soil amendments controlled?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Manure and inputs can introduce pathogens, chemicals, or heavy metals.
rules.Corrective Action: Define input approval, treatment, and pre-harvest interval controls.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Uncontrolled inputs trigger increased testing.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم التحكم في المدخلات الزراعية مثل الأسمدة والسماد العضوي ومحسنات التربة؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: حدد موافقة المدخلات والمعالجة وضوابط الفترة قبل الحصاد.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: السماد والمدخلات الزراعية قد تُدخل مسببات أمراض أو مواد كيميائية أو معادن ثقيلة.

rules.Question: Are harvesting or collection tools maintained and clean?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are harvesting or collection tools maintained and clean?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Dirty or damaged tools can contaminate raw materials.
rules.Corrective Action: Implement tool sanitation and inspection program.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated failures elevate raw material risk.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم الحفاظ على أدوات الحصاد والجمع نظيفة وفي حالة جيدة؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: طبّق برنامج تعقيم وفحص للأدوات.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: الأدوات المتسخة أو التالفة قد تلوث المواد الخام.

rules.Question: Are raw materials protected during temporary on-farm storage before delivery?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are raw materials protected during temporary on-farm storage before delivery?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Uncontrolled storage may permit pest, microbial, or chemical contamination.
rules.Corrective Action: Define storage conditions and maximum holding times.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Poor storage triggers receiving inspection/testing.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M04 Pest; M06 Storage; M08 Traceability
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل تُحمى المواد الخام أثناء التخزين المؤقت في المزرعة قبل التسليم؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: حدد ظروف التخزين والمدة القصوى للاحتفاظ بالمواد.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: التخزين غير المضبوط قد يسمح بالتلوث بالآفات أو الميكروبات أو المواد الكيميائية.

rules.Question: For animal-derived raw materials, are animals under documented veterinary supervision?
rules.Requirement Logic: For animal-derived raw materials, are animals under documented veterinary supervision?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Animal disease may introduce pathogens or unsafe raw materials.
rules.Corrective Action: Require veterinary supervision and health documentation.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If absent, receiving may become CCP/OPRP for animal-derived materials.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: بالنسبة للمواد الخام ذات الأصل الحيواني، هل الحيوانات تحت إشراف بيطري موثق؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: اشترط الإشراف البيطري والتوثيق الصحي للحيوانات.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: أمراض الحيوانات قد تُدخل مسببات أمراض أو مواد خام غير آمنة.

rules.Question: Are sick animals excluded from food production or their products segregated/rejected?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are sick animals excluded from food production or their products segregated/rejected?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Milk/meat/eggs/fish from sick animals may be unsafe or treated with drugs.
rules.Corrective Action: Exclude affected animals/products; hold/reject raw materials.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failure triggers receiving rejection and HACCP review.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم استبعاد الحيوانات المريضة من الإنتاج الغذائي أو عزل منتجاتها ورفضها؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: استبعد الحيوانات/المنتجات المتأثرة؛ أوقف المواد الخام أو ارفضها.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: الحليب/اللحوم/البيض/الأسماك من حيوانات مريضة قد تكون غير آمنة أو تحتوي على بقايا أدوية.

rules.Question: Are zoonotic disease controls documented where relevant?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are zoonotic disease controls documented where relevant?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Zoonoses can enter the food chain from infected animals.
rules.Corrective Action: Require surveillance and control measures from supplier.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Uncontrolled zoonosis risk triggers intensified controls.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل يتم توثيق ضوابط الأمراض الحيوانية المنشأ (Zoonoses) عند الاقتضاء؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: اشترط من المورد تقديم برامج مراقبة وضوابط الأمراض الحيوانية.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: الأمراض الحيوانية المنشأ (Zoonoses) قد تدخل سلسلة الغذاء من الحيوانات المصابة.

rules.Question: Are milking, slaughter, egg collection, or fish handling practices hygienic and documented?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are milking, slaughter, egg collection, or fish handling practices hygienic and documented?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Poor collection practices can contaminate raw materials.
rules.Corrective Action: Require documented hygienic collection controls.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failure activates receiving testing/inspection and supplier corrective action.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 Cleaning; M05 Hygiene; M06 Receiving
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل ممارسات الحلب والذبح وجمع البيض ومناولة الأسماك صحية وموثقة؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: اشترط ضوابط موثقة للجمع الصحي.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: ممارسات الجمع الرديئة قد تلوث المواد الخام.

rules.Question: For milk, are mastitis controls and abnormal milk rejection procedures documented?
rules.Requirement Logic: For milk, are mastitis controls and abnormal milk rejection procedures documented?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Mastitis and treatments may increase microbial and antibiotic risks.
rules.Required Evidence: Mastitis log; abnormal milk rejection records
rules.Corrective Action: Reject abnormal milk and monitor herd health.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Absence triggers receiving antibiotic/micro testing and possible CCP.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: بالنسبة للحليب، هل يتم توثيق ضوابط مرض التهاب الضرع وإجراءات رفض الحليب غير الطبيعي؟
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: ارفض الحليب غير الطبيعي وراقب صحة القطيع.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: التهاب الضرع ومعالجاته قد يزيد من مخاطر التلوث الميكروبي وبقايا المضادات الحيوية.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Mastitis log; abnormal milk rejection records

rules.Question: Are veterinary drug treatments recorded by animal/group, date, drug, dose, and responsible person?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are veterinary drug treatments recorded by animal/group, date, drug, dose, and responsible person?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Incomplete drug records can lead to residue violations.
rules.Corrective Action: Implement complete veterinary drug recordkeeping.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If absent, receiving testing for residues required.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M07 Records; M06 Receiving; HACCP Chemical
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل veterinary drug treatments recorded by animal/group, date, drug, dose, and responsible person?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Implement complete veterinary drug recordkeeping.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Incomplete drug records can lead to residue violations.

rules.Question: Are withdrawal periods defined and verified before raw materials are accepted?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are withdrawal periods defined and verified before raw materials are accepted?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Drug residues may remain if withdrawal periods are not respected.
rules.Corrective Action: Do not accept materials until withdrawal compliance is verified.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Absence triggers receiving CCP/OPRP for residue control.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل withdrawal periods defined and verified before raw materials are accepted?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Do not accept materials until withdrawal compliance is verified.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Drug residues may remain if withdrawal periods are not respected.

rules.Question: Is milk/egg/meat/fish from treated animals segregated and prevented from entering supply until release?
rules.Requirement Logic: Is milk/egg/meat/fish from treated animals segregated and prevented from entering supply until release?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Treated animal products may contaminate compliant batches.
rules.Corrective Action: Segregate treated animal products; reject if control cannot be proven.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failure triggers batch hold and traceability investigation.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: Is milk/egg/meat/fish from treated animals segregated and prevented from entering supply until release?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Segregate treated animal products; reject if control cannot be proven.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Treated animal products may contaminate compliant batches.

rules.Question: Is there periodic testing or verification for veterinary drug residues based on risk?
rules.Requirement Logic: Is there periodic testing or verification for veterinary drug residues based on risk?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Supplier declarations alone may not verify residue control.
rules.Corrective Action: Set residue testing frequency by supplier risk.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Positive or absent testing escalates receiving controls.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: Is there periodic testing or verification for veterinary drug residues based on risk?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Set residue testing frequency by supplier risk.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Supplier declarations alone may not verify residue control.

rules.Question: Are prohibited or unauthorized veterinary substances controlled?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are prohibited or unauthorized veterinary substances controlled?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unauthorized substances can create serious regulatory and safety risk.
rules.Required Evidence: Supplier declaration; authority records; testing where needed
rules.Corrective Action: Reject supplier/material if prohibited substance control is not verified.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Critical failure triggers supplier disqualification and receiving hold.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل prohibited or unauthorized veterinary substances controlled?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Reject supplier/material if prohibited substance control is not verified.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Unauthorized substances can create serious regulatory and safety risk.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Supplier declaration; authority records; testing where needed

rules.Question: For dairy animals, is feed controlled for aflatoxin B1 risk?
rules.Requirement Logic: For dairy animals, is feed controlled for aflatoxin B1 risk?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Aflatoxin B1 in feed can lead to aflatoxin M1 in milk.
rules.Required Evidence: Feed COA; aflatoxin B1 test; supplier approval
rules.Corrective Action: Require tested/approved feed and supplier control.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If feed control absent, raw milk receiving requires aflatoxin M1 testing/CCP evaluation.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: For dairy animals, is feed controlled for aflatoxin B1 risk?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Require tested/approved feed and supplier control.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Aflatoxin B1 in feed can lead to aflatoxin M1 in milk.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Feed COA; aflatoxin B1 test; supplier approval

rules.Question: For grains, nuts, spices, and susceptible raw materials, is mycotoxin risk assessed by origin, season, storage, and supplier history?
rules.Requirement Logic: For grains, nuts, spices, and susceptible raw materials, is mycotoxin risk assessed by origin, season, storage, and supplier history?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Susceptible crops may contain aflatoxins/ochratoxin/other mycotoxins.
rules.Corrective Action: Create commodity-specific mycotoxin control plan.

rules.Question: Are supplier corrective actions tracked to closure when findings occur?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are supplier corrective actions tracked to closure when findings occur?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Findings without closure allow repeated failures.
rules.Corrective Action: Issue CAPA, verify closure, and reassess supplier risk.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unclosed CAPA escalates supplier risk and affects approval status.

rules.Question_AR: هل supplier corrective actions tracked to closure when findings occur?

rules.Question: Are supplier-related complaints, recalls, and alerts reviewed for risk reassessment?
rules.Requirement Logic: Are supplier-related complaints, recalls, and alerts reviewed for risk reassessment?
rules.Hazard / Risk: External events may signal supplier control failure.
rules.Corrective Action: Review incidents and update supplier risk classification.

rules.Requirement Logic: Can each accepted raw material batch be linked to supplier, date/time received, transport, COA, and receiving decision?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Incomplete batch traceability weakens recall and root-cause analysis.
rules.Required Evidence: Batch record; receipt log; COA; release decision
rules.Corrective Action: Complete batch-level receiving traceability before use.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failure triggers M08 traceability failure and system fail.

rules.Question: Is the supplier control program verified through internal audit or management review?
rules.Requirement Logic: Is the supplier control program verified through internal audit or management review?
rules.Hazard / Risk: Programs may exist on paper but fail without verification.
rules.Corrective Action: Add supplier control verification to audit schedule.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No verification weakens overall GMP confidence.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: Codex CXC 1-1969: General Principles of Food Hygiene, sections on primary production, GHP, HACCP, monitoring, verification, documentation.
rules.Question_AR: هل supplier control program verified through internal audit or management review?

rules.Question: Is the facility located away from environmental pollution sources that may contaminate food?
rules.Requirement Logic: If site is near pollution source, risk assessment and controls or relocation/physical barriers are required.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Industrial emissions, dust, heavy metals, chemical drift
rules.Required Evidence: Site risk assessment, map, surrounding activity survey
rules.Corrective Action: Conduct site risk assessment; implement barriers or reject site if risk cannot be controlled.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If site contamination can reach raw/finished food and is not controlled → HACCP evaluation for receiving/environmental contamination.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier risk; M07 documentation; M08 traceability for affected lots
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 GHP premises/location; EU 852/2004 Annex II Ch. I

rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Conduct site risk assessment; implement barriers or reject site if risk cannot be controlled.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Industrial emissions, dust, heavy metals, chemical drift
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Site risk assessment, map, surrounding activity survey

rules.Question: Is the facility protected from floods, seasonal run-off, sewage overflow, or standing water?
rules.Requirement Logic: Facility must not be exposed to flood or sewage contamination; drainage and elevation controls are required.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Floodwater, sewage, environmental pathogens, chemical contaminants
rules.Required Evidence: Flood risk assessment, drainage map, municipal data
rules.Corrective Action: Improve drainage/elevation/barriers; suspend operation if flooding affects food areas.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Flood/sewage event affecting food contact areas → hold affected product and HACCP/environmental review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M04 pest; M08 affected batch recall scope
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 premises/location; EU 852/2004 Annex II Ch. I
rules.Notes: السيول ليست فقط خطر بنية تحتية؛ هي خطر ميكروبي وكيميائي.
rules.Question_AR: هل facility protected from floods, seasonal run-off, sewage overflow, or standing water?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Improve drainage/elevation/barriers; suspend operation if flooding affects food areas.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Floodwater, sewage, environmental pathogens, chemical contaminants
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Flood risk assessment, drainage map, municipal data

rules.Question: Is the facility located and maintained to avoid persistent pest harbourage around the premises?
rules.Requirement Logic: External grounds must not attract pests; harbourage and vegetation/waste accumulation must be controlled.
rules.Product / Process Trigger: High pest pressure, waste nearby, vegetation accumulation
rules.Corrective Action: Remove harbourage; increase monitoring; coordinate with pest contractor.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Persistent pest entry into production → escalates M04 Pest Control and M03 cleaning verification.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M04 pest; M03 cleaning; M07 records

rules.Notes: يرتبط مباشرة بموديول الآفات وليس فقط الموقع.
rules.Question_AR: هل facility located and maintained to avoid persistent pest harbourage around the premises?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Remove harbourage; increase monitoring; coordinate with pest contractor.

rules.Question: Are access roads, loading areas and yards designed to minimize dust, mud and contamination entry?
rules.Requirement Logic: Traffic areas should be paved/controlled and managed to prevent transfer of contaminants into food areas.
rules.Product / Process Trigger: Unpaved roads, wet yard, high traffic
rules.Required Evidence: Yard layout, cleaning schedule, traffic control plan
rules.Corrective Action: Improve surfaces; add boot/wheel control; clean loading areas.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If dust/mud contaminates open product → process/environment review and possible hold.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 facility; M05 personnel; M06 operational handling
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 premises; EU 852/2004 Annex II Ch. I
rules.Question_AR: هل access roads, loading areas and yards designed to minimize dust, mud and contamination entry?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Improve surfaces; add boot/wheel control; clean loading areas.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Yard layout, cleaning schedule, traffic control plan

rules.Question: Does the facility layout support one-way flow: raw material → processing → finished product?
rules.Requirement Logic: Layout must minimize cross-contamination by preventing backward movement of raw materials or waste into clean/finished areas.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Cross-contamination between raw and finished product
rules.Required Evidence: Facility layout, process flow diagram, zoning map
rules.Corrective Action: Redesign flow; create physical/time separation; implement zoning controls.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If raw/finished cross-over cannot be controlled by GMP → affected step becomes HACCP trigger or enhanced PRP.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M06 operational control; M03 cleaning; M08 batch traceability
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 GHP premises/layout; EU 852/2004 Annex II Ch. I
rules.Notes: هذا هو المبدأ الأساسي الذي ذكرته: مادة أولية → إنتاج → منتج نهائي.
rules.Question_AR: هل the facility layout support one-way flow: raw material → processing → finished product?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Redesign flow; create physical/time separation; implement zoning controls.

rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Facility layout, process flow diagram, zoning map

rules.Question: Are raw and ready-to-eat/finished product areas physically or effectively separated?

rules.Corrective Action: Install barriers; separate staff/tools; use controlled access.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failure in RTE separation → HACCP review for post-lethality contamination.

rules.Corrective Action: Define routes; add hygiene stations; restrict movement.

rules.Question: Is waste movement separated from raw/finished product flow?

rules.Corrective Action: Repair cracks; improve slope; control pooling.

rules.Question: Are doors, windows and openings sealed or screened to prevent pest, dust and contamination entry?

rules.Question: Are solid wastes collected in covered, identified containers and removed before accumulation?

rules.Question: Are chemical wastes stored and disposed of separately from food, packaging and food-contact materials?

rules.Question: Is ventilation adequate to control heat, humidity, odours, dust and airborne contamination?

rules.Question: Does airflow move from clean/high-hygiene areas toward lower hygiene areas, not the reverse?

rules.Question: Are high hygiene/RTE areas protected by controlled entry points and hygiene barriers?
rules.Requirement Logic: High hygiene areas require controlled access based on risk: handwash, footwear, clothing change and access restriction.
rules.Product / Process Trigger: Exposed finished product after lethality step
rules.Required Evidence: Zone map, entry procedure, access controls
rules.Corrective Action: Install entry controls; restrict access; verify compliance.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No entry control in RTE/high hygiene → HACCP/post-process contamination trigger.

rules.Question: Are tools, utensils and mobile equipment controlled by zone to prevent cross-contamination?
rules.Requirement Logic: Tools/equipment must be dedicated or cleaned/controlled between zones.
rules.Corrective Action: Dedicate/colour-code tools; clean between zones; verify compliance.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Shared contaminated tools affecting product → M03/M06 trigger.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M05 personnel; M06 operational
rules.Notes: قاعدة مهمة لليوزر حتى يفهم التطبيق العملي.
rules.Question_AR: هل tools, utensils and mobile equipment controlled by zone to prevent cross-contamination?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Dedicate/colour-code tools; clean between zones; verify compliance.

rules.Question: Are handwashing stations supplied with soap, hygienic drying and waste bins where needed?
rules.Requirement Logic: Handwashing infrastructure must be functional, not only physically present.
rules.Corrective Action: Provide soap/towels/dryers/bins; daily checks.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated failure → M05 training and hygiene escalation.

rules.Notes: وجود المغسلة بدون صابون لا يكفي.
rules.Question_AR: هل handwashing stations supplied with soap, hygienic drying and waste bins where needed?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Provide soap/towels/dryers/bins; daily checks.

rules.Question: Are visitor and contractor entry routes controlled to prevent contamination?
rules.Requirement Logic: Visitors/contractors must follow hygiene zoning and protective clothing requirements.
rules.Corrective Action: Apply visitor controls, PPE and escorting.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated uncontrolled entry → M05/M07 finding.
rules.Question_AR: هل visitor and contractor entry routes controlled to prevent contamination?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Apply visitor controls, PPE and escorting.

rules.Question: Are construction materials compatible with the food process environment (wet, acidic, salty, dusty, hot)?
rules.Requirement Logic: Materials must withstand operating conditions without degradation or contamination.
rules.Corrective Action: Replace incompatible materials; protect surfaces; review cleaning chemicals.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Material degradation affecting product → product hold and M03/M08 review.

rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 premises/equipment suitability; EU 852/2004 Annex II
rules.Question_AR: هل construction materials compatible with the food process environment (wet, acidic, salty, dusty, hot)?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Replace incompatible materials; protect surfaces; review cleaning chemicals.

rules.Question: Are temporary repairs controlled, documented and replaced by permanent hygienic repairs?
rules.Requirement Logic: Temporary repairs must not create contamination risks and must have time-bound replacement.
rules.Corrective Action: Remove unsafe temporary repair; replace with permanent hygienic repair.
rules.HACCP Trigger: If temporary repair contacts/overhangs product → hold/review affected product.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M07 documentation; M06 operational; M08 traceability
rules.Question_AR: هل temporary repairs controlled, documented and replaced by permanent hygienic repairs?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Remove unsafe temporary repair; replace with permanent hygienic repair.

rules.Question: Is there a documented pre-operational approval/release before using new or modified food areas?
rules.Requirement Logic: New/modified areas must be verified for hygienic design, cleaning, utilities and flow before operation.
rules.Corrective Action: Complete hygienic commissioning; verify utilities/cleaning before use.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Use of unapproved area with product exposure → affected product review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M06 operational; M07 records
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 review/update systems; EU 852/2004 hygiene procedures
rules.Notes: للموقع كمنتج مدفوع: يطلع تقرير commissioning.

rules.Question: Are facility/infrastructure changes assessed for food safety impact before implementation?
rules.Requirement Logic: Changes in layout, equipment, utilities or materials must trigger food safety review.
rules.Product / Process Trigger: New line, new utility, new wall/floor, new drain
rules.Corrective Action: Perform risk assessment; update SOPs/layout/HACCP if needed.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Major process/layout change may trigger HACCP plan review.

rules.Question_AR: هل facility/infrastructure changes assessed for food safety impact before implementation?

rules.Question: Is there a documented cleaning and sanitation program covering all food areas, equipment, utensils and tools?
rules.Requirement Logic: A documented program must define what is cleaned, how, when, by whom, chemicals used, verification and records.
rules.Corrective Action: Create documented SSOP and master schedule before relying on GMP controls.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No SSOP = GMP prerequisite failure; HACCP plan cannot rely on cleaning controls.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 GHP cleaning; EU 852/2004 Annex II Ch. I/V
rules.Notes: هذا هو الحد الأدنى لوجود نظام تنظيف.

rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Create documented SSOP and master schedule before relying on GMP controls.

rules.Question: Does the cleaning program classify areas/equipment by risk level and food safety impact?
rules.Requirement Logic: Cleaning intensity/frequency must reflect product risk, process exposure, moisture, allergen and hygiene zone.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Under-cleaning high-risk areas or over-reliance on generic frequency
rules.Product / Process Trigger: High hygiene zones, RTE, allergens, high moisture
rules.Corrective Action: Create cleaning risk classification and adjust frequencies by risk.
rules.HACCP Trigger: High-risk area not classified → M06/M02 review for hygiene zoning.

rules.Question_AR: هل the cleaning program classify areas/equipment by risk level and food safety impact?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Create cleaning risk classification and adjust frequencies by risk.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Under-cleaning high-risk areas or over-reliance on generic frequency

rules.Question: Are cleaning responsibilities clearly assigned to trained personnel or contractors?
rules.Requirement Logic: Responsibilities must be assigned and understood, including line release responsibility.
rules.Corrective Action: Define roles; train staff; assign verification authority.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated missed cleaning → M05 training and M07 records trigger.

rules.Question_AR: هل cleaning responsibilities clearly assigned to trained personnel or contractors?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Define roles; train staff; assign verification authority.

rules.Question: Does the master cleaning schedule include all relevant equipment, rooms, drains, utensils, storage, waste areas and high-risk points?
rules.Requirement Logic: The schedule must cover direct and indirect contamination sources, not only production machines.
rules.Product / Process Trigger: Drains, ceilings, walls, stores, utensils, waste areas

rules.HACCP Trigger: Missing drains/waste/high-risk surfaces can trigger M02/M04/M06 review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 facility; M04 pest; M06 operational

rules.Question_AR: هل the master cleaning schedule include all relevant equipment, rooms, drains, utensils, storage, waste areas and high-risk points?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Add missing areas/equipment; define frequency and method.

rules.Question: Is pre-operational inspection performed before production or after cleaning where product safety may be affected?
rules.Requirement Logic: Food-contact and high-risk areas must be released before production starts.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Residues, foreign material, chemical residues before production
rules.Corrective Action: Stop production until pre-op passed; reclean and re-inspect.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failed pre-op with production started → hold affected product and trace batch.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M06 operational; M08 traceability; M07 records
rules.Question_AR: Is pre-operational inspection performed before production or after cleaning where product safety may be affected?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Stop production until pre-op passed; reclean and re-inspect.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Residues, foreign material, chemical residues before production

rules.Question: Are cleaning methods defined with steps such as dry removal/pre-rinse, detergent application, mechanical action, rinse, sanitation and drying where applicable?
rules.Requirement Logic: Methods must be specific enough to be repeatable and effective.
rules.Corrective Action: Define step-by-step procedure and train staff.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Poor execution may trigger cleaning verification and product hold if food contact affected.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 cleaning; EU 852/2004 Annex II Ch. V
rules.Notes: حولنا التنظيف إلى خطوات قابلة للتطبيق.
rules.Question_AR: هل cleaning methods defined with steps such as dry removal/pre-rinse, detergent application, mechanical action, rinse, sanitation and drying where applicable?

rules.Question: Are all food-contact surfaces cleaned at a frequency that prevents contamination and residues?
rules.Requirement Logic: Food-contact surfaces must be cleaned before use and as needed to prevent contamination.

rules.Question_AR: هل all food-contact surfaces cleaned at a frequency that prevents contamination and residues?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Stop use; reclean; verify; assess affected products.

rules.Question: Are non-food-contact surfaces cleaned to prevent indirect contamination and pest attraction?
rules.Requirement Logic: Non-food-contact surfaces must be maintained clean according to risk and proximity to product.
rules.Corrective Action: Add to cleaning schedule; verify hygiene condition.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated failure → M04 pest and M02 facility review.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 premises cleaning; EU 852/2004 Annex II
rules.Question_AR: هل non-food-contact surfaces cleaned to prevent indirect contamination and pest attraction?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Add to cleaning schedule; verify hygiene condition.

rules.Question: Is cleaning performed between batches when cross-contamination, allergen carryover or product changeover risk exists?
rules.Requirement Logic: Changeovers must include appropriate cleaning and release before next product/batch.

rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Reclean; validate release; hold product if carryover suspected.

rules.Question: Are cleaning tools dedicated, identified, stored hygienically and segregated by area/risk?
rules.Requirement Logic: Tools must not transfer contamination between zones, allergens, raw/RTE or drains/food surfaces.
rules.Corrective Action: Dedicate/color-code tools; replace contaminated tools; train staff.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Use of drain/raw tools on food-contact surfaces → Critical and product hold.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 zoning; M05 personnel; M06 operational
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 cross contamination; EU 852/2004 Annex II

rules.Question_AR: هل cleaning tools dedicated, identified, stored hygienically and segregated by area/risk?

rules.Question: Is cleaning during production controlled to prevent splashing, aerosols, chemical contact or physical contamination?
rules.Requirement Logic: In-process cleaning must be risk assessed and controlled to prevent contamination of exposed product.
rules.Corrective Action: Stop exposed production or protect product; restrict wet cleaning during open handling.

rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 contamination prevention; EU 852/2004 Annex II
rules.Notes: Cleaning can become a source of contamination.
rules.Question_AR: Is cleaning during production controlled to prevent splashing, aerosols, chemical contact or physical contamination?

rules.Question: For dry products, is dry cleaning controlled to avoid water introduction and microbial growth?
rules.Requirement Logic: Dry environments should use controlled dry cleaning unless wet cleaning is validated and fully dried.

rules.Question_AR: For dry products, is dry cleaning controlled to avoid water introduction and microbial growth?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Use dry methods; validate wet cleaning/drying if used.

rules.Question: Are drains cleaned using dedicated tools and sequence to avoid contaminating food-contact areas?
rules.Requirement Logic: Drains are high-risk reservoirs and must be cleaned last or by dedicated procedures/tools.
rules.Corrective Action: Separate drain tools; clean drains after food-contact cleaning; verify high-risk areas.

rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 cleaning/cross contamination; EU 852/2004 Annex II
rules.Question_AR: هل drains cleaned using dedicated tools and sequence to avoid contaminating food-contact areas?

rules.Question: Are detergents, disinfectants and sanitizers approved for intended food facility use?
rules.Requirement Logic: Chemicals must be suitable for food premises and used according to manufacturer/safety instructions.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unauthorized chemical residues or ineffective sanitation
rules.Required Evidence: Approved chemical list, SDS, label instructions
rules.Corrective Action: Remove unapproved chemicals; review affected uses; approve alternatives.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unapproved chemical contact with product/surface → product hold and risk assessment.

rules.Question: Are sanitizer/detergent concentrations controlled and verified where concentration affects safety or effectiveness?
rules.Requirement Logic: Critical cleaning chemicals must be used at validated/label concentrations.

rules.Question: Is sanitizer contact time defined and followed?
rules.Requirement Logic: Sanitizers require minimum contact time for effectiveness and must be used as specified.

rules.HACCP Trigger: Inadequate sanitation of food-contact surfaces → HACCP trigger if product exposed.

rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Define and monitor contact time; repeat sanitation if not met.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Survival of microorganisms or chemical residue

rules.Question: Are rinse/no-rinse requirements defined and controlled after chemical application?
rules.Requirement Logic: Rinse steps must follow chemical instructions to avoid residue or reduced sanitizer effectiveness.

rules.Question: Are cleaning chemicals stored, labelled and segregated away from food, packaging and utensils?
rules.Requirement Logic: Chemical storage must prevent accidental contamination or misuse.

rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 chemical control; EU 852/2004 Annex II
rules.Question_AR: هل cleaning chemicals stored, labelled and segregated away from food, packaging and utensils?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Segregate/label/secure chemicals; remove from food areas.

rules.Question: Are dosing systems and dilution devices maintained and verified?
rules.Requirement Logic: Automated dosing must be checked to ensure correct chemical delivery.

rules.Linked Module Impact: M06 operational; M07 records; M08 traceability
rules.Question_AR: هل dosing systems and dilution devices maintained and verified?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Repair/calibrate dosing; verify concentration; assess surfaces/products.

rules.Question: Where CIP is used, has the CIP cycle been validated for time, temperature, flow/turbulence and chemical concentration?
rules.Requirement Logic: CIP must be demonstrated effective for the equipment, soil load and product risk.
rules.Corrective Action: Validate CIP; adjust parameters; reclean and verify.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unvalidated failed CIP on food-contact system → hold affected product and HACCP review.

rules.Question: Are each CIP cycle parameters monitored and recorded?
rules.Requirement Logic: CIP time, temperature, chemical concentration and flow/pressure must be recorded where relevant.

rules.Question: Are CIP circuits/valves designed and verified to prevent cross-connection between clean and dirty circuits?
rules.Requirement Logic: CIP routing must avoid cross-contamination and ensure all surfaces are reached.

rules.Question: Where COP/soak tanks are used, are solution concentration, temperature, soil load and change frequency controlled?
rules.Requirement Logic: COP solutions must remain effective and not become contamination reservoirs.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Contaminated soak tank or ineffective cleaning
rules.Corrective Action: Refresh solution; verify concentration/temp; reclean affected items.

rules.Question: Is visual inspection performed after cleaning before equipment/area release?

rules.Question: Are cleaning verification failures trended by area, equipment, shift and root cause?

rules.Question: Are gross residues and waste removed before wet cleaning or sanitation?
rules.Requirement Logic: Gross soil must be removed to allow detergents/sanitizers to work effectively.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Organic load neutralizes sanitizer, biofilm, pest attraction

rules.Question: Where drying is required, are surfaces dried or drained to prevent microbial growth and chemical dilution?

rules.Question: Are equipment parts disassembled where necessary to allow effective cleaning?

rules.Question_AR: هل utensils, trays, knives and small tools cleaned/sanitized and stored to prevent recontamination?

rules.Question: Is cleaning and inspection performed after maintenance or construction work before restarting production?

rules.HACCP Trigger: Pest activity through openings triggers M02 facility corrective action.
rules.Question_AR: هل windows, vents and openings screened/protected and kept in good repair?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Install/repair screens; restrict opening; inspect routinely.

rules.Question: Are drains protected and maintained to prevent pest entry, breeding and harbourage?
rules.Requirement Logic: Drains must not provide pest entry or breeding sites; covers/traps and cleaning are required.
rules.Corrective Action: Repair covers/traps; clean drains; intensify monitoring.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Drain pest activity triggers M03 drain sanitation and M02 drainage review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 drainage; M03 cleaning; M06 operational
rules.Question_AR: هل drains protected and maintained to prevent pest entry, breeding and harbourage?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Repair covers/traps; clean drains; intensify monitoring.

rules.Question: Are external grounds managed to remove harbourage such as vegetation, debris, standing water and unused equipment?
rules.Requirement Logic: Grounds must be maintained to avoid pest attraction and harbourage near the premises.
rules.Corrective Action: Remove debris, cut vegetation, eliminate standing water.
rules.HACCP Trigger: External pest pressure may increase monitoring frequency and M02 external area review.
rules.Question_AR: هل external grounds managed to remove harbourage such as vegetation, debris, standing water and unused equipment?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Remove debris, cut vegetation, eliminate standing water.

rules.Question: Is standing water inside or outside the facility controlled to prevent insect breeding?
rules.Requirement Logic: Standing water must be eliminated or controlled as pest breeding source.
rules.Corrective Action: Remove water; improve drainage/ventilation; clean affected area.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Persistent water triggers M02 drainage/ventilation and M03 cleaning review.
rules.Question_AR: Is standing water inside or outside the facility controlled to prevent insect breeding?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Remove water; improve drainage/ventilation; clean affected area.

rules.Question: Are waste bins, compactors and waste areas designed and maintained to avoid pest attraction?
rules.Requirement Logic: Waste must be contained, covered, removed and cleaned at frequency preventing pest attraction.
rules.Corrective Action: Cover/clean bins; increase removal; relocate waste away from entries.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Pest activity from waste can affect product and trigger M02/M03/M08 review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 waste; M03 cleaning; M08 traceability
rules.Notes: Critical when waste directly creates infestation.
rules.Question_AR: هل waste bins, compactors and waste areas designed and maintained to avoid pest attraction?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Cover/clean bins; increase removal; relocate waste away from entries.

rules.Question: Are raw materials stored to prevent pest access and infestation?
rules.Requirement Logic: Raw material storage must protect food from pests and stored-product insects.
rules.Corrective Action: Quarantine affected material; inspect stock; improve storage and monitoring.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Infested raw material → M01 supplier and M08 traceability trigger.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier; M08 traceability; M06 storage
rules.Question_AR: هل raw materials stored to prevent pest access and infestation?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Quarantine affected material; inspect stock; improve storage and monitoring.

rules.Question: Are finished products protected from pest access during storage, staging and dispatch?
rules.Requirement Logic: Finished products must be stored and dispatched under conditions preventing pest contamination.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Finished product contamination and recall risk
rules.Corrective Action: Hold affected product; inspect and clean area; correct entry/monitoring.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Pest evidence on/near finished product → product hold/recall evaluation.
rules.Question_AR: هل finished products protected from pest access during storage, staging and dispatch?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold affected product; inspect and clean area; correct entry/monitoring.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Finished product contamination and recall risk

rules.Question: Is primary packaging protected from pest contamination?
rules.Requirement Logic: Packaging that contacts/protects food must be stored to prevent pest access and damage.
rules.Corrective Action: Quarantine damaged/exposed packaging; improve protection.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Contaminated primary packaging used → product hold/traceability review.
rules.Question_AR: Is primary packaging protected from pest contamination?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Quarantine damaged/exposed packaging; improve protection.

rules.Question: Is a pest monitoring system implemented with appropriate device types and inspection frequency?
rules.Requirement Logic: Monitoring devices must be installed and checked at frequency matching risk.
rules.Corrective Action: Install risk-based monitoring system; define frequency and responsibilities.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No monitoring = blind system and GMP fail.
rules.Question_AR: Is a pest monitoring system implemented with appropriate device types and inspection frequency?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Install risk-based monitoring system; define frequency and responsibilities.

rules.Question: Are device types suitable for target pests and facility zones?
rules.Requirement Logic: Monitoring/control devices must match target pest: rodents, crawling insects, flying insects, stored-product insects, birds.
rules.Corrective Action: Adjust device type/placement based on target pest and risk zone.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Inadequate device type with activity may escalate trend failure.
rules.Question_AR: هل device types suitable for target pests and facility zones?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Adjust device type/placement based on target pest and risk zone.

rules.Question: Are devices placed based on risk, entry points, walls, storage, waste and historical activity?
rules.Requirement Logic: Device placement must be risk-based and documented on the map.
rules.Corrective Action: Reposition/add devices according to risk points and trends.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Poor placement with increasing activity triggers program redesign.
rules.Question_AR: هل devices placed based on risk, entry points, walls, storage, waste and historical activity?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Reposition/add devices according to risk points and trends.

rules.Question: Are all monitoring devices uniquely identified and physically matched to the site map?
rules.Requirement Logic: Each device must have a unique ID to support records, trends and corrective actions.
rules.Corrective Action: Label devices; reconcile map and register.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unidentified devices make trend engine unreliable.
rules.Question_AR: هل all monitoring devices uniquely identified and physically matched to the site map?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Label devices; reconcile map and register.

rules.Question: Is device inspection frequency defined and adjusted according to risk and activity?
rules.Requirement Logic: High-risk zones and active trends require increased inspection frequency.
rules.Corrective Action: Increase frequency in high-risk/active zones.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated activity with low frequency = ineffective monitoring.
rules.Question_AR: Is device inspection frequency defined and adjusted according to risk and activity?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Increase frequency in high-risk/active zones.

rules.Question: Are scheduled inspections completed and documented with status for every device?
rules.Requirement Logic: Missed inspections must be recorded and corrected.
rules.Corrective Action: Complete missed inspection; investigate data gap; adjust schedule.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated missed inspections → contractor/internal KPI failure.
rules.Question_AR: هل scheduled inspections completed and documented with status for every device?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Complete missed inspection; investigate data gap; adjust schedule.

rules.Question: Are pest activity counts recorded by device, date, pest type and location?
rules.Requirement Logic: Quantitative or structured activity data is required for trend analysis.
rules.Corrective Action: Record pest type/count/location/date; standardize categories.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No counts limits risk intelligence and trend analysis.
rules.Question_AR: هل pest activity counts recorded by device, date, pest type and location?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Record pest type/count/location/date; standardize categories.

rules.Question: Are zero-activity inspections recorded, not left blank?
rules.Requirement Logic: Zero findings must be documented to distinguish no activity from no inspection.
rules.Corrective Action: Require explicit zero/none status for each device.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Blank records weaken audit evidence.
rules.Question_AR: هل zero-activity inspections recorded, not left blank?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Require explicit zero/none status for each device.

rules.Question: Are internal staff performing routine visual pest inspections in addition to contractor visits?
rules.Requirement Logic: Daily/operational awareness helps detect activity between contractor inspections.
rules.Corrective Action: Add internal visual checks; train staff to report activity.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Internal findings trigger corrective action even before contractor visit.
rules.Question_AR: هل internal staff performing routine visual pest inspections in addition to contractor visits?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Add internal visual checks; train staff to report activity.

rules.Question: Is there a clear process for employees to report pest sightings or evidence immediately?
rules.Requirement Logic: Sightings must be reported and escalated quickly with location and evidence.
rules.Corrective Action: Implement reporting form/hotline; train employees; investigate reports.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Reported activity in food zone may trigger hold/review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M05 personnel; M07 records; M08 traceability
rules.Question_AR: هل يوجد clear process for employees to report pest sightings or evidence immediately?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Implement reporting form/hotline; train employees; investigate reports.

rules.Question: Are pest risk zones classified such as external, receiving, storage, processing, high hygiene and finished product?
rules.Requirement Logic: Zones must determine tolerance, device type, inspection frequency and response level.
rules.Corrective Action: Classify zones and define zone-specific tolerance/action levels.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No zoning weakens zero tolerance and response logic.
rules.Question_AR: هل pest risk zones classified such as external, receiving, storage, processing, high hygiene and finished product?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Classify zones and define zone-specific tolerance/action levels.

rules.Question: Is pest activity in RTE/high-hygiene/open finished product areas treated as zero tolerance?
rules.Requirement Logic: Pest activity in high hygiene/finished product exposure zones must trigger immediate hold/investigation.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Direct contamination of ready-to-eat or exposed finished product
rules.Applicability Rule: RTE=Yes OR high hygiene=Yes OR open finished=Yes
rules.Product / Process Trigger: Pest activity in high hygiene zone
rules.Corrective Action: Stop/hold affected area/product; investigate and intensify controls.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Pest activity in high hygiene zone → product hold and HACCP/M08 trigger.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M06 operational; M08 traceability; M03 cleaning
rules.Active Input Trigger: RTE=Yes OR high hygiene=Yes OR open finished=Yes
rules.Question_AR: Is pest activity in جاهز للاستهلاك (RTE)/high-hygiene/open finished product areas treated as zero tolerance?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Stop/hold affected area/product; investigate and intensify controls.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Direct contamination of ready-to-eat or exposed finished product

rules.Question: Is evidence of pests on food-contact surfaces treated as critical?
rules.Requirement Logic: Any pest evidence on food-contact surfaces must trigger immediate cleaning, product assessment and investigation.
rules.Corrective Action: Stop line; clean/disinfect; assess product; root cause investigation.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Food-contact pest evidence → product hold and HACCP/M08 trigger.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M06 operational; M08 traceability
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 food-contact contamination; EU 852/2004 Annex II
rules.Question_AR: Is evidence of pests on food-contact surfaces treated as critical?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Stop line; clean/disinfect; assess product; root cause investigation.

rules.Question: Is pest evidence on finished product, packaging or finished goods storage treated as critical?
rules.Requirement Logic: Finished product pest evidence requires quarantine, assessment and traceability review.
rules.Corrective Action: Quarantine affected stock; trace lots; clean area; investigate root cause.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Finished product pest evidence → M08 recall/hold trigger.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M08 traceability; M06 storage; M03 cleaning
rules.Question_AR: Is pest evidence on finished product, packaging or finished goods storage treated as critical?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Quarantine affected stock; trace lots; clean area; investigate root cause.

rules.Question: Are external activity thresholds defined separately from internal food areas?
rules.Requirement Logic: External activity can be tolerated only within action levels and must not trend toward the building.
rules.Corrective Action: Increase external controls; seal entry points; trend movement toward building.
rules.HACCP Trigger: External trend moving inward → M02 prevention review.
rules.Notes: External activity not same as internal.
rules.Question_AR: هل external activity thresholds defined separately from internal food areas?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Increase external controls; seal entry points; trend movement toward building.

rules.Question: Are rodent controls designed to detect and prevent entry, nesting and contamination?
rules.Requirement Logic: Rodent program must include exclusion, external baiting/monitoring and internal non-toxic monitoring where appropriate.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Droppings, urine, hair, gnaw damage, pathogen transfer
rules.Corrective Action: Investigate entry, seal, clean, increase monitoring and assess product exposure.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Rodent evidence inside food/storage area → product hold/traceability review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 entry sealing; M03 cleaning; M08 traceability
rules.Question_AR: هل rodent controls designed to detect and prevent entry, nesting and contamination?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Investigate entry, seal, clean, increase monitoring and assess product exposure.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Droppings, urine, hair, gnaw damage, pathogen transfer

rules.Question: Are cockroach and crawling insect risks monitored and controlled in warm, moist or hidden areas?
rules.Requirement Logic: Crawling insects require monitoring in harbourage areas and root-cause correction.
rules.Corrective Action: Identify harbourage; clean/sanitize; treat source; seal gaps.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Activity in food-contact/RTE zone escalates to Critical.
rules.Question_AR: هل cockroach and crawling insect risks monitored and controlled in warm, moist or hidden areas?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Identify harbourage; clean/sanitize; treat source; seal gaps.

rules.Question: Are flying insects monitored and controlled without risk of fragment contamination?
rules.Requirement Logic: Flying insect controls must prevent product contamination and be positioned away from exposed product.
rules.Corrective Action: Reposition ILTs; control entry/waste; increase monitoring.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Flying insect activity over exposed RTE/food-contact area → Critical.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 doors/air; M03 cleaning; M06 operations
rules.Question_AR: هل flying insects monitored and controlled without risk of fragment contamination?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Reposition ILTs; control entry/waste; increase monitoring.

rules.Question: For grains, powders, spices or dry ingredients, are stored-product insects monitored and controlled?
rules.Requirement Logic: Dry raw materials require controls for weevils, moths and other stored-product insects.
rules.Corrective Action: Quarantine affected stock; inspect adjacent lots; review supplier/storage.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Infested raw/finished dry product → M01/M08 trigger.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier; M06 storage; M08 traceability
rules.Question_AR: For grains, powders, spices or dry ingredients, are stored-product insects monitored and controlled?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Quarantine affected stock; inspect adjacent lots; review supplier/storage.

rules.Question: Are birds prevented from nesting, roosting or entering receiving/dispatch/production areas?
rules.Requirement Logic: Bird control must prevent droppings, feathers and nesting materials from contaminating premises or products.
rules.Corrective Action: Remove nests safely; block access; clean affected surfaces.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Bird evidence in food/product area may escalate to Critical and product hold.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 building; M03 cleaning; M08 traceability
rules.Question_AR: هل birds prevented from nesting, roosting or entering receiving/dispatch/production areas?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Remove nests safely; block access; clean affected surfaces.

rules.Question: Are domestic or stray animals prevented from entering or approaching food handling/storage areas?
rules.Requirement Logic: Animals must not access food premises areas where contamination could occur.
rules.Corrective Action: Block access; clean/disinfect affected areas; improve barriers.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Animal entry into production/storage → product exposure review.
rules.Question_AR: هل domestic or stray animals prevented from entering or approaching food handling/storage areas?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Block access; clean/disinfect affected areas; improve barriers.

rules.Question: Are external bait stations secured, numbered, tamper-resistant and placed to avoid food contamination?
rules.Requirement Logic: Bait stations must be controlled to prevent bait contamination and unauthorized access.
rules.Corrective Action: Secure/label stations; repair damaged stations; reconcile bait usage.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Bait contamination near food → chemical contamination review.
rules.Notes: Toxic bait in food areas must be strictly controlled.
rules.Question_AR: هل external bait stations secured, numbered, tamper-resistant and placed to avoid food contamination?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Secure/label stations; repair damaged stations; reconcile bait usage.

rules.Question: Is toxic bait prohibited inside food production/storage areas unless justified and controlled?
rules.Requirement Logic: Toxic bait must not create chemical contamination risk inside food areas.
rules.Required Evidence: Pest contractor plan, chemical risk assessment
rules.Corrective Action: Remove toxic bait from production/storage; use non-toxic monitoring; risk assess exceptions.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Toxic bait exposure to food/packaging → product hold/chemical risk review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 storage; M08 traceability; M07 records
rules.Question_AR: Is toxic bait prohibited inside food production/storage areas unless justified and controlled?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Remove toxic bait from production/storage; use non-toxic monitoring; risk assess exceptions.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Pest contractor plan, chemical risk assessment

rules.Question: Are glue boards/traps maintained, replaced and positioned to avoid contamination and lost efficacy?
rules.Requirement Logic: Glue traps must be serviced and not become contamination sources.
rules.Corrective Action: Replace full/damaged/dusty boards; relocate if unsuitable.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Full/dirty boards in high hygiene zone escalate to corrective action.
rules.Question_AR: هل glue boards/traps maintained, replaced and positioned to avoid contamination and lost efficacy?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Replace full/damaged/dusty boards; relocate if unsuitable.

rules.Question: Are insect light traps positioned away from exposed food and not over food-contact surfaces?
rules.Requirement Logic: ILTs must attract insects away from product and prevent fragments from contaminating food.
rules.Corrective Action: Relocate ILT; protect exposed product; clean area.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Improper ILT over exposed product → product contamination risk/hold.
rules.Question_AR: هل insect light traps positioned away from exposed food and not over food-contact surfaces?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Relocate ILT; protect exposed product; clean area.

rules.Question: Are pesticides/insecticides approved, controlled and used by competent personnel according to instructions?
rules.Requirement Logic: Pesticides must be approved and applied without contaminating food, packaging or equipment.
rules.Required Evidence: Approved chemical list, SDS, application record
rules.Corrective Action: Use approved chemicals; isolate food areas; verify post-treatment release.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Pesticide use in food area → product/area release and chemical risk assessment.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M07 records; M08 traceability
rules.Question_AR: هل pesticides/insecticides approved, controlled and used by competent personnel according to instructions?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Use approved chemicals; isolate food areas; verify post-treatment release.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Approved chemical list, SDS, application record

rules.Question: Is the area released after pest treatment before food handling resumes?
rules.Requirement Logic: After chemical or physical pest treatment, areas must be cleaned/verified where needed and released.
rules.Corrective Action: Clean/inspect/release area; hold exposed product/packaging.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Production before release → product hold/traceability review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M06 operational; M08 traceability
rules.Question_AR: هل area released after pest treatment before food handling resumes?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Clean/inspect/release area; hold exposed product/packaging.

rules.Question: Are pest monitoring results trended by pest type, device, location, zone and time?
rules.Requirement Logic: Trend analysis is needed to detect deterioration before infestation occurs.
rules.Corrective Action: Create trend analysis by zone/pest/device/time.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No trend = weak effectiveness evaluation.
rules.Question_AR: هل pest monitoring results trended by pest type, device, location, zone and time?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Create trend analysis by zone/pest/device/time.

rules.Question: Does an increasing pest activity trend trigger investigation and corrective action?
rules.Requirement Logic: Increasing trends must trigger root cause analysis and intensified controls.
rules.Corrective Action: Investigate root cause; increase monitoring; fix source/entry/harbourage.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Increasing trend in internal/high-risk zones → GMP fail until controlled.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 facility; M03 cleaning; M06 operations
rules.Question_AR: هل an increasing pest activity trend trigger investigation and corrective action?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Investigate root cause; increase monitoring; fix source/entry/harbourage.

rules.Question: Are action thresholds defined by pest type, zone and product risk?
rules.Requirement Logic: Thresholds must be defined; high hygiene/food-contact zones may have zero tolerance.
rules.Corrective Action: Define thresholds by pest/zone/product risk.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No thresholds makes decisions subjective.
rules.Question_AR: هل action thresholds defined by pest type, zone and product risk?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Define thresholds by pest/zone/product risk.

rules.Question: Does exceeding a threshold trigger documented corrective action and verification?
rules.Requirement Logic: Threshold exceedance requires immediate action proportional to zone and risk.
rules.Corrective Action: Take corrective action; verify effectiveness; review product exposure.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Threshold exceeded in food/finished area → M06/M08 trigger.
rules.Notes: Critical when threshold represents safety risk.
rules.Question_AR: هل exceeding a threshold trigger documented corrective action and verification?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Take corrective action; verify effectiveness; review product exposure.

rules.Question: Are repeated findings clustered by area/device investigated for harbourage or entry point?
rules.Requirement Logic: Spatial clusters indicate root causes such as entry gaps, waste, drains, poor cleaning or storage.
rules.Corrective Action: Inspect area; correct structural/sanitation/source issue.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Cluster at drain/waste/storage links to M02/M03/M04 actions.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 facility; M03 cleaning; M04 prevention
rules.Question_AR: هل repeated findings clustered by area/device investigated for harbourage or entry point?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Inspect area; correct structural/sanitation/source issue.

rules.Question: Are seasonal pest patterns reviewed and controls adjusted before high-risk seasons?
rules.Requirement Logic: Seasonal risk requires preventive adjustment, not reaction after activity spikes.
rules.Corrective Action: Adjust frequency/devices/external controls before season.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Poor season prep can become Major if trend increases.
rules.Question_AR: هل seasonal pest patterns reviewed and controls adjusted before high-risk seasons?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Adjust frequency/devices/external controls before season.

rules.Question: Are pest findings investigated for root cause rather than only treated?
rules.Requirement Logic: Corrective action must identify source: entry point, waste, water, supplier, storage, cleaning or facility defect.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Repeated activity due to uncorrected cause
rules.Corrective Action: Investigate cause and assign permanent corrective action.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Repeated unexplained findings escalate module risk.
rules.Question_AR: هل pest findings investigated for root cause rather than only treated?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Investigate cause and assign permanent corrective action.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Repeated activity due to uncorrected cause

rules.Question: Are corrective actions tracked to completion with responsible person and due date?
rules.Requirement Logic: Actions must be closed and verified; open actions should escalate by risk.
rules.Corrective Action: Assign owner/due date; close and verify; escalate overdue critical actions.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Overdue critical action = module fail until controlled.
rules.Question_AR: هل corrective actions tracked to completion with responsible person and due date?
