rules.Requirement Logic: Tools and containers must not transfer hazards between raw/RTE/allergen/chemical zones.
rules.Corrective Action: Dedicate/color-code; clean/verify before reuse.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Wrong tool in RTE/allergen context may be Critical.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M05 personnel; M02 zoning
rules.Question_AR: هل utensils, containers, tools and mobile equipment segregated or controlled between risk zones/products?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Dedicate/color-code; clean/verify before reuse.

rules.Question: Is movement of people, materials, waste and equipment controlled during operations?
rules.Requirement Logic: Operational traffic must follow hygienic flow and not bypass layout controls.
rules.Corrective Action: Enforce routes; schedule movements; correct violations.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Traffic breach in high hygiene/RTE may trigger product review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 layout; M05 hygiene; M04 pest/waste
rules.Notes: Layout only works if operations follow it.
rules.Question_AR: Is movement of people, materials, waste and equipment controlled during operations?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Enforce routes; schedule movements; correct violations.

rules.Question: Are open products protected from environmental, personnel, cleaning, pest and maintenance contamination during operation?
rules.Requirement Logic: Open product exposure must be controlled by covers, zoning, time limits, hygiene and environmental controls.
rules.Corrective Action: Cover/protect product; stop incompatible activities; assess exposure.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Open product contamination event triggers M08 traceability/product hold.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 environment; M03 cleaning; M04 pest; M05 hygiene; M08
rules.Question_AR: هل open products protected from environmental, personnel, cleaning, pest and maintenance contamination during operation?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Cover/protect product; stop incompatible activities; assess exposure.

rules.Question: Is product protected or held when condensation, leaks or drips occur above open product or food-contact surfaces?
rules.Requirement Logic: Leaks/condensation events must trigger immediate product protection, area correction and risk assessment.
rules.Corrective Action: Stop/cover/hold product; repair source; clean/release area.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Product exposure to drip/leak → M08 traceability and HACCP review.
rules.Question_AR: Is product protected or held when condensation, leaks or drips occur above open product or food-contact surfaces?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Stop/cover/hold product; repair source; clean/release area.

rules.Question: Are allergen-containing materials clearly identified during production and storage/staging?
rules.Requirement Logic: Allergens must be operationally identified to prevent mix-up and cross-contact.
rules.Corrective Action: Label/segregate allergen materials; train staff; verify before use.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Allergen mix-up triggers label/traceability review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M05 hygiene; M08; Label Engine
rules.Question_AR: هل allergen-containing materials clearly identified during production and storage/staging?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Label/segregate allergen materials; train staff; verify before use.

rules.Question: Is production scheduled to reduce allergen cross-contact risk?
rules.Requirement Logic: Scheduling should consider non-allergen before allergen, compatible allergen grouping or validated changeover.
rules.Corrective Action: Adjust schedule; perform validated changeover; verify release.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failed allergen scheduling/changeover may trigger product hold.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 allergen cleaning; M05 allergen behavior
rules.Question_AR: Is production scheduled to reduce allergen cross-contact risk?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Adjust schedule; perform validated changeover; verify release.

rules.Question: Is line clearance performed before allergen/non-allergen changeover?
rules.Requirement Logic: Line clearance must remove previous materials, labels, packaging, rework and residues before next product.
rules.Product / Process Trigger: Changeover from allergen to non-allergen/different allergen
rules.Corrective Action: Stop start-up until cleared; hold product if clearance missed.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Missed allergen line clearance → M08/label/recall trigger.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 cleaning; M08 traceability; Label Engine
rules.Question_AR: Is line clearance performed before allergen/non-allergen changeover?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Stop start-up until cleared; hold product if clearance missed.

rules.Question: Is rework controlled so allergen status is known and compatible with the final product?
rules.Requirement Logic: Rework must not introduce undeclared allergens or change formulation identity.
rules.Corrective Action: Segregate rework by allergen; verify formulation/label; hold if uncertain.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Uncontrolled allergen rework → label/traceability trigger.
rules.Question_AR: Is rework controlled so allergen status is known and compatible with the final product?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Segregate rework by allergen; verify formulation/label; hold if uncertain.

rules.Question: Is rework authorized, identified and controlled before use?
rules.Requirement Logic: Rework must be approved based on safety, quality, formulation and traceability status.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold rework until assessed and authorized; reject uncertain rework.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unauthorized rework may trigger product hold and M08 tracing.
rules.Question_AR: Is rework authorized, identified and controlled before use?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold rework until assessed and authorized; reject uncertain rework.

rules.Question: Can rework be traced back to original batch and forward to final product batch?
rules.Requirement Logic: Rework traceability must identify source batch, reason, quantity, use date and final batch.
rules.Corrective Action: Record source/final batch link; block use if unknown.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unknown rework source → broad hold/recall scope.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 documentation/traceability support; EU traceability support
rules.Question_AR: Can rework be traced back to original batch and forward to final product batch?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Record source/final batch link; block use if unknown.

rules.Question: Are rework addition limits and conditions defined?
rules.Requirement Logic: Rework quantity, age, storage conditions and compatibility must be defined.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Overuse/old rework causing safety or label issues
rules.Corrective Action: Define limits; verify formulation and safety; reject nonconforming rework.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Exceeding rework limit may trigger product hold.
rules.Question_AR: هل rework addition limits and conditions defined?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Define limits; verify formulation and safety; reject nonconforming rework.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Overuse/old rework causing safety or label issues

rules.Question: Is nonconforming product only reworked when risk assessment and validated process support it?
rules.Requirement Logic: Nonconforming product cannot be reworked unless safety and compliance are demonstrated.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold; assess; reject or rework only with documented justification.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unsafe/non-evaluated rework → HACCP/M08 trigger.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M07 records; M08 traceability; Master Engine
rules.Question_AR: Is nonconforming product only reworked when risk assessment and validated process support it?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold; assess; reject or rework only with documented justification.

rules.Question: Is line clearance performed before start-up or product changeover to remove previous product, labels and packaging?
rules.Requirement Logic: Line clearance prevents mix-up, allergen errors and foreign materials.
rules.Corrective Action: Stop start-up; clear line; verify; hold product if produced without clearance.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Wrong label/allergen risk triggers M08/Label Engine.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M08 traceability; Label Engine; M03 cleaning
rules.Question_AR: Is line clearance performed before start-up or product changeover to remove previous product, labels and packaging?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Stop start-up; clear line; verify; hold product if produced without clearance.

rules.Question: Are labels and packaging verified against product, batch and formulation before and during packing?
rules.Requirement Logic: Correct labels/packaging must be verified to prevent allergen and regulatory non-compliance.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Wrong label, undeclared allergen, wrong date/batch
rules.Corrective Action: Hold product with wrong label; correct/relabel only if controlled.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Label error with allergen/safety impact → recall review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: Label Engine; M08 traceability; M07 records
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 product information; EU food information alignment
rules.Question_AR: هل labels and packaging verified against product, batch and formulation before and during packing?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold product with wrong label; correct/relabel only if controlled.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Wrong label, undeclared allergen, wrong date/batch

rules.Question: Is batch/date coding controlled, legible and verified?
rules.Requirement Logic: Coding must enable traceability and prevent wrong shelf-life/batch information.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Traceability failure or wrong shelf life
rules.Corrective Action: Correct coding; hold affected product if code missing/wrong.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Wrong code may trigger M08 traceability issue.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 traceability/product info support; EU traceability support
rules.Question_AR: Is batch/date coding controlled, legible and verified?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Correct coding; hold affected product if code missing/wrong.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Traceability failure or wrong shelf life

rules.Question: Are changeovers checked for tools, parts, cleaning materials and leftover product?
rules.Requirement Logic: Changeover release must ensure no foreign materials or previous product remain.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Foreign body or previous product carryover
rules.Corrective Action: Remove items; re-inspect; hold if production occurred before check.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Foreign body found after start → product hold/search scope.
rules.Question_AR: هل changeovers checked for tools, parts, cleaning materials and leftover product?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Remove items; re-inspect; hold if production occurred before check.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Foreign body or previous product carryover

rules.Question: Are deviations from defined operational limits detected and recorded in real time or before release?
rules.Requirement Logic: The system must identify parameter, hygiene, process and product deviations promptly.
rules.Corrective Action: Record deviation; stop/hold as needed; initiate disposition.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unrecorded critical deviation = module fail and HACCP trigger.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 monitoring/corrective action; EU 852/2004 HACCP procedures
rules.Question_AR: هل deviations from defined operational limits detected and recorded in real time or before release?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Record deviation; stop/hold as needed; initiate disposition.

rules.Question: Are immediate corrective actions defined for each operational deviation?
rules.Requirement Logic: Each deviation needs a predefined action to regain control and control affected product.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Delay or wrong response to deviation
rules.Corrective Action: Stop/adjust/segregate/hold according to deviation type.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No corrective action for safety deviation = fail/HACCP trigger.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 corrective action; EU 852/2004 HACCP procedures
rules.Question_AR: هل immediate corrective actions defined for each operational deviation?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Stop/adjust/segregate/hold according to deviation type.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Delay or wrong response to deviation

rules.Question: Is affected product disposition decided and documented after deviations?
rules.Requirement Logic: Deviation response must include product hold/release/rework/reject decision with justification.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unsafe product released or unnecessary broad rejection
rules.Corrective Action: Hold product until QA decision; document disposition and evidence.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No disposition after safety deviation → M08 recall/hold trigger.
rules.Question_AR: Is affected product disposition decided and documented after deviations?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold product until QA decision; document disposition and evidence.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Unsafe product released or unnecessary broad rejection

rules.Question: Are root causes investigated for repeated or critical deviations?
rules.Requirement Logic: Repeated/critical deviations require root cause and preventive action.
rules.Corrective Action: Perform RCA; implement preventive action; verify effectiveness.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Recurring critical deviation escalates master risk and HACCP review.
rules.Question_AR: هل root causes investigated for repeated or critical deviations?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Perform RCA; implement preventive action; verify effectiveness.

rules.Question: Can the affected time/batch/line window be defined for each deviation?
rules.Requirement Logic: Deviation impact must be bounded by monitoring records, time, line, batch and traceability data.
rules.Corrective Action: Define affected window; if uncertain, expand hold scope.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unknown deviation window → broad hold/recall scope.
rules.Question_AR: Can the affected time/batch/line window be defined for each deviation?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Define affected window; if uncertain, expand hold scope.

rules.Question: Is release after deviation allowed only with documented evidence showing product safety/compliance?
rules.Requirement Logic: Release after deviation must be justified by scientific/technical evidence and authorized by competent person.
rules.Corrective Action: Keep product on hold until evidence supports release; otherwise reject/rework per validated method.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unjustified release after critical deviation → fail/recall review.
rules.Question_AR: Is release after deviation allowed only with documented evidence showing product safety/compliance?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Keep product on hold until evidence supports release; otherwise reject/rework per validated method.

rules.Question: Is there an effective hold/quarantine system preventing use or dispatch of non-released product?
rules.Requirement Logic: Held products must be physically/systemically controlled to prevent accidental use/release.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold product; control access; reconcile quantities.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Hold failure may trigger recall review.
rules.Question_AR: هل يوجدn effective hold/quarantine system preventing use or dispatch of non-released product?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold product; control access; reconcile quantities.

rules.Question: Is product released only after required checks, records and deviations are reviewed?
rules.Requirement Logic: Release must verify processing, monitoring, label, traceability and testing requirements are satisfied.
rules.Corrective Action: Block release until all requirements met; document release decision.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Release without review after critical controls → recall risk.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M07 documentation; M08 traceability; Label Engine
rules.Question_AR: Is product released only after required checks, records and deviations are reviewed?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Block release until all requirements met; document release decision.

rules.Question: Are produced, held, reworked, rejected and released quantities reconciled?
rules.Requirement Logic: Quantity reconciliation ensures all affected product is accounted for after deviations or holds.
rules.Corrective Action: Reconcile quantities before release/closure.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unreconciled critical hold may trigger M08 issue.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 documentation/traceability support; EU traceability support
rules.Question_AR: هل produced, held, reworked, rejected and released quantities reconciled?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Reconcile quantities before release/closure.

rules.Question: Is rejected product controlled to prevent re-entry into production or distribution?
rules.Requirement Logic: Rejected product must be identified, segregated and disposed/reworked only if authorized.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Rejected product accidentally used or shipped
rules.Corrective Action: Segregate and dispose securely; document destruction/rework authorization.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Rejected product re-entry → recall risk.
rules.Question_AR: Is rejected product controlled to prevent re-entry into production or distribution?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Segregate and dispose securely; document destruction/rework authorization.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Rejected product accidentally used or shipped

rules.Question: Are monitoring devices available, suitable and located where needed?
rules.Requirement Logic: Operational monitoring requires suitable devices such as thermometers, pH meters, scales, timers and sensors.
rules.Corrective Action: Provide suitable devices; suspend critical operation if unavailable.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No device for critical parameter = HACCP/GMP fail.
rules.Question_AR: هل monitoring devices available, suitable and located where needed?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Provide suitable devices; suspend critical operation if unavailable.

rules.Question: Are monitoring devices calibrated or verified at defined frequency?
rules.Requirement Logic: Measurements used for safety decisions must be reliable.
rules.Corrective Action: Calibrate/verify; assess products monitored since last valid check.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Invalid critical measurement → hold/review affected product.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M02 control equipment; M07 records; M08
rules.Question_AR: هل monitoring devices calibrated or verified at defined frequency?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Calibrate/verify; assess products monitored since last valid check.

rules.Question: Do operational records include date, time, batch, line, operator, value, limit, status and corrective action?
rules.Requirement Logic: Records must support control evidence and traceability.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Cannot prove safe operation or define affected window
rules.Corrective Action: Update record templates; train operators; review completeness.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Missing critical record after deviation → M08 broad hold.
rules.Question_AR: هل operational records include date, time, batch, line, operator, value, limit, status and corrective action?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Update record templates; train operators; review completeness.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Cannot prove safe operation or define affected window

rules.Question: Are records completed at the time of operation rather than after-the-fact?
rules.Requirement Logic: Real-time records reduce falsification, memory errors and missed deviations.
rules.Corrective Action: Train staff; supervise records; investigate late entries.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Late records at critical step may invalidate release.
rules.Question_AR: هل records completed at the time of operation rather than after-the-fact?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Train staff; supervise records; investigate late entries.

rules.Question: Are operational records reviewed by competent personnel before product release or at defined frequency?
rules.Requirement Logic: Record review detects deviations and prevents unintended release.
rules.Corrective Action: Review records; block release if incomplete/out of limit.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No review before release → product release failure.
rules.Question_AR: هل operational records reviewed by competent personnel before product release or at defined frequency?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Review records; block release if incomplete/out of limit.

rules.Question: Are storage conditions maintained according to product requirements and monitored?
rules.Requirement Logic: Storage must control temperature, humidity, segregation and protection based on product risk.
rules.Corrective Action: Adjust conditions; hold affected materials; assess exposure duration.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Storage failure may trigger product hold and M08 traceability.
rules.Question_AR: هل storage conditions maintained according to product requirements and monitored?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Adjust conditions; hold affected materials; assess exposure duration.

rules.Question: Is FIFO/FEFO or equivalent stock rotation implemented and verified?
rules.Requirement Logic: Stock rotation must prevent expired/old material use and support traceability.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Expired material or wrong stock use
rules.Corrective Action: Correct stock layout; block expired materials; retrain warehouse staff.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Expired unsafe material use triggers product impact review.
rules.Question_AR: Is أولاً يدخل أولاً يخرج (FIFO)/FEFO or equivalent stock rotation implemented and verified?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Correct stock layout; block expired materials; retrain warehouse staff.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Expired material or wrong stock use

rules.Question: Are dispatch vehicle conditions checked before loading finished products?
rules.Requirement Logic: Dispatch must verify cleanliness, temperature capability, pest evidence, segregation and product protection.
rules.Corrective Action: Do not load unsafe vehicle; hold product if loaded/exposed.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Dispatch failure affects M08 forward traceability.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M08 traceability; M02 dispatch; M04 pest
rules.Question_AR: هل dispatch vehicle conditions checked before loading finished products?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Do not load unsafe vehicle; hold product if loaded/exposed.

rules.Question: For temperature-controlled products, is cold chain maintained through loading and transport handover?
rules.Requirement Logic: Cold chain must be monitored until product is handed over or dispatched under defined responsibility.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Growth due to cold chain break
rules.Required Evidence: Loading temps, vehicle temp, dispatch time
rules.Corrective Action: Hold if vehicle/temperature unsuitable; assess time outside limit.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Cold chain break triggers M08 customer/batch review.
rules.Question_AR: For temperature-controlled products, is cold chain maintained through loading and transport handover?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold if vehicle/temperature unsuitable; assess time outside limit.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Growth due to cold chain break
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Loading temps, vehicle temp, dispatch time

rules.Question: For dairy heat treatment, are pasteurization/UHT parameters controlled, recorded and verified?
rules.Requirement Logic: Dairy heat processes must meet validated parameters and be continuously/appropriately monitored.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold product if parameters not met; verify divert/reprocess; trace affected volume.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Dairy heat failure = likely CCP deviation.
rules.Notes: Limit values depend on applicable law/process validation.
rules.Question_AR: For dairy heat treatment, are pasteurization/UHT parameters controlled, recorded and verified?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold product if parameters not met; verify divert/reprocess; trace affected volume.

rules.Question: For milk, are aflatoxin M1/antibiotic residue risks controlled at receiving based on supplier/testing plan?
rules.Requirement Logic: Milk receiving must control chemical hazards not eliminated by processing.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold/reject milk if testing/supplier controls absent or failed.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Weak supplier/testing may make receiving CCP/OPRP.
rules.Question_AR: For milk, are aflatoxin M1/antibiotic residue risks controlled at receiving based on supplier/testing plan?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold/reject milk if testing/supplier controls absent or failed.

rules.Question: For meat/poultry cooked products, are cooking, post-cook handling and cooling controls integrated?
rules.Requirement Logic: Meat cooking/cooling must control pathogen survival and growth/post-process contamination.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold if cook/cool limits not met; review post-cook exposure.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Likely CCP/OPRP trigger.
rules.Question_AR: For meat/poultry cooked products, are cooking, post-cook handling and cooling controls integrated?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold if cook/cool limits not met; review post-cook exposure.

rules.Question: For fish, are temperature, ice, thawing and dispatch controls maintained throughout handling?
rules.Requirement Logic: Fish operations must control time/temperature and hygienic ice/contact surfaces.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold fish if temperature/ice controls fail; assess product risk.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Fish cold chain failure may trigger HACCP/M08.
rules.Question_AR: For fish, are temperature, ice, thawing and dispatch controls maintained throughout handling?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold fish if temperature/ice controls fail; assess product risk.

rules.Question: For grains/dry foods, are moisture/aw, drying and storage conditions controlled to prevent mold/mycotoxin risk?
rules.Requirement Logic: Dry products require moisture control and safe storage to prevent mold growth and mycotoxins.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold/segregate lot; continue drying if validated; test if risk indicated.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Moisture abuse can trigger receiving/storage HACCP review.
rules.Question_AR: For grains/dry foods, are moisture/aw, drying and storage conditions controlled to prevent mold/mycotoxin risk?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold/segregate lot; continue drying if validated; test if risk indicated.

rules.Question: For canned/thermally processed foods, are scheduled process, container closure and cooling water controls documented and monitored?
rules.Requirement Logic: Thermal processing requires validated scheduled process, seal/closure integrity and cooling water hygiene.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Survival of spores, leakage, post-process contamination
rules.Required Evidence: Thermal process records, seam checks, cooling water records
rules.Corrective Action: Hold affected lot if process/seam/cooling controls fail; evaluate by competent authority/expert.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Thermal process deviation = CCP and product hold.
rules.Notes: Not a substitute for product-specific canning code.
rules.Question_AR: For canned/thermally processed foods, are scheduled process, container closure and cooling water controls documented and monitored?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold affected lot if process/seam/cooling controls fail; evaluate by competent authority/expert.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Survival of spores, leakage, post-process contamination
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Thermal process records, seam checks, cooling water records

rules.Question: For beverages, are water quality, mixing, filtration, carbonation/filling and closure controls monitored?
rules.Requirement Logic: Beverage operations must control ingredient water and product-contact process parameters.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Contaminated water, wrong formulation, closure failure
rules.Corrective Action: Hold product if water/process/closure controls fail; trace affected production.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Critical water/process failure may trigger HACCP/M08.
rules.Question_AR: For beverages, are water quality, mixing, filtration, carbonation/filling and closure controls monitored?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold product if water/process/closure controls fail; trace affected production.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Contaminated water, wrong formulation, closure failure

rules.Question: Are critical/important operational controls validated where they claim to control hazards?
rules.Requirement Logic: Controls used to reduce/eliminate/prevent hazards must be validated before reliance.
rules.Product / Process Trigger: Cooking, cooling, pH, aw, CIP-related process, detector
rules.Corrective Action: Validate control or treat as unproven; hold product if already relied on and unsafe.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unvalidated safety control triggers HACCP plan review.
rules.Question_AR: هل critical/important operational controls validated where they claim to control hazards?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Validate control or treat as unproven; hold product if already relied on and unsafe.

rules.Question: Are operational controls verified through record review, direct observation, testing or calibration?
rules.Requirement Logic: Monitoring must be complemented by verification to prove controls work as intended.
rules.Corrective Action: Implement verification plan; act on failures and trends.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failed verification may trigger hold/review depending product impact.
rules.Question_AR: هل operational controls verified through record review, direct observation, testing or calibration?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Implement verification plan; act on failures and trends.

rules.Question: Are operational deviations and monitoring results trended by line, product, shift, parameter and root cause?
rules.Requirement Logic: Trend analysis identifies emerging loss of control before critical failure.
rules.Corrective Action: Trend results; target CAPA by line/shift/product.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Increasing critical trends escalate master risk.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M05 worker tracking; M07 records; Master Engine
rules.Question_AR: هل operational deviations and monitoring results trended by line, product, shift, parameter and root cause?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Trend results; target CAPA by line/shift/product.

rules.Question: Is the site able to simulate a deviation and identify affected product, workers, line, materials and customers?
rules.Requirement Logic: Mock tests validate decision and traceability capability after operational deviation.
rules.Corrective Action: Run mock test; improve data links and response time.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failure may escalate if traceability cannot identify affected stock.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M08 traceability; M05 worker tracking; M01 materials
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 corrective action/documentation; EU traceability support
rules.Question_AR: هل site able to simulate a deviation and identify affected product, workers, line, materials and customers?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Run mock test; improve data links and response time.

rules.Question: Is first production after process/equipment/SOP change verified before normal release?
rules.Requirement Logic: Changes must be verified by enhanced checks or validation before routine release.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold/review first run; verify parameters and product before release.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Failure in first run may trigger change control/HACCP review.
rules.Question_AR: Is first production after process/equipment/إجراء تشغيل موحد (SOP) change verified before normal release?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold/review first run; verify parameters and product before release.

rules.Question: Are operational control performance, deviations, holds and releases reviewed by management?
rules.Requirement Logic: Management review ensures resources and systemic corrective actions for recurring operational risk.
rules.Corrective Action: Review KPIs, deviations, holds, CAPA, training and equipment needs.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Poor performance trends escalate master GMP maturity risk.
rules.Question_AR: هل operational control performance, deviations, holds and releases reviewed by management?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Review KPIs, deviations, holds, CAPA, training and equipment needs.

rules.Question: Is there a documented traceability and recall procedure covering one-step-back, internal traceability, one-step-forward and recall/withdrawal?
rules.Requirement Logic: The traceability system must define data fields, responsibilities, record retention, testing and recall decision logic.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unable to trace, withdraw or recall affected product
rules.Corrective Action: Create documented procedure and assign responsibilities before relying on traceability.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No traceability procedure undermines product hold/recall and legal defense.
rules.Question_AR: هل يوجد إجراء موثق لـ traceability and recall procedure covering one-step-back, internal traceability, one-step-forward and recall/withdrawal?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Create documented procedure and assign responsibilities before relying on traceability.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Unable to trace, withdraw or recall affected product

rules.Question: Does traceability scope cover raw materials, ingredients, packaging, rework, WIP, finished product, customers and returns?
rules.Requirement Logic: Scope must cover all items that can affect product identity, safety, compliance or recall scope.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Trace gaps for materials or products
rules.Corrective Action: Expand scope to include missing material/product categories.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Missing high-risk item scope may become Critical.
rules.Notes: Include packaging because labels/food-contact packaging matter.
rules.Question_AR: هل traceability scope cover raw materials, ingredients, packaging, rework, WIP, finished product, customers and returns?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Expand scope to include missing material/product categories.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Trace gaps for materials or products

rules.Question: Are unique identifiers defined for suppliers, materials, raw batches, production batches, workers, machines, lines, customers and shipments?
rules.Requirement Logic: Traceability requires stable unique IDs to connect records across modules.
rules.Corrective Action: Create unique ID schema and prevent duplicate IDs.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Ambiguous ID after incident forces broad hold/recall scope.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M07 evidence; M05 worker tracking; M06 batch records
rules.Question_AR: هل unique identifiers defined for suppliers, materials, raw batches, production batches, workers, machines, lines, customers and shipments?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Create unique ID schema and prevent duplicate IDs.

rules.Question: Are traceability, recall and product disposition responsibilities defined and authorized?
rules.Requirement Logic: Roles must define who initiates trace, who holds product, who contacts customers/authorities and who closes recall.
rules.Corrective Action: Define recall team and authorization levels; train members.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No authorized decision maker delays critical recall response.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 recall procedures; EU 178/2002 food business responsibility
rules.Question_AR: هل traceability, recall and product disposition responsibilities defined and authorized?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Define recall team and authorization levels; train members.

rules.Question: Are traceability records retained for a defined period appropriate to shelf life, legal requirements and risk?
rules.Requirement Logic: Records must remain available long enough to support recall, investigation and regulatory evidence.
rules.Corrective Action: Define retention period and secure archive/access.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Missing records for active shelf-life product may become Critical.
rules.Notes: User can configure local legal requirement.
rules.Question_AR: هل traceability records retained for a defined period appropriate to shelf life, legal requirements and risk?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Define retention period and secure archive/access.

rules.Question: Can the business identify the direct supplier of each raw material, ingredient, packaging or food-contact item?
rules.Requirement Logic: One-step-back traceability requires supplier identity for each received item.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unable to identify source of affected material
rules.Corrective Action: Block use until supplier/source identity is recorded; update master data.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unknown supplier for safety issue triggers broad product hold and M01 review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier; M06 receiving; M07 records
rules.Question_AR: Can the business identify the direct supplier of each raw material, ingredient, packaging or food-contact item?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Block use until supplier/source identity is recorded; update master data.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Unable to identify source of affected material

rules.Question: Are supplier contact details and addresses sufficient to support rapid investigation/recall?
rules.Requirement Logic: Supplier records must allow fast contact and verification of source information.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Delayed investigation due to incomplete supplier data
rules.Corrective Action: Complete supplier master data and verify periodically.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Incomplete supplier details can delay recall investigation.
rules.Question_AR: هل supplier contact details and addresses sufficient to support rapid investigation/recall?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Complete supplier master data and verify periodically.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Delayed investigation due to incomplete supplier data

rules.Question: Is each incoming material linked to supplier lot/batch and internal receiving lot ID?
rules.Requirement Logic: Incoming materials must have batch/lot identity to support source tracing and affected product scope.
rules.Required Evidence: Receiving log, supplier lot, internal lot label
rules.Corrective Action: Assign internal lot ID and link to supplier lot before use.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unknown raw lot used in production triggers broad hold scope.
rules.Question_AR: Is each incoming material linked to supplier lot/batch and internal receiving lot ID?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Assign internal lot ID and link to supplier lot before use.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Receiving log, supplier lot, internal lot label

rules.Question: Are COA, lab results or release evidence linked to the exact raw material lot?
rules.Requirement Logic: Release evidence must be lot-specific, not generic or supplier-level only.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Wrong or missing evidence for lot release
rules.Corrective Action: Hold lot until evidence linked; reject if evidence cannot be matched.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unlinked evidence after safety hazard triggers M06 hold and M01 review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier; M06 positive release; M07 evidence
rules.Question_AR: هل شهادة التحليل (COA), lab results or release evidence linked to the exact raw material lot?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold lot until evidence linked; reject if evidence cannot be matched.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Wrong or missing evidence for lot release

rules.Question: Are delivery date, time and receiving condition recorded for each lot?
rules.Requirement Logic: Delivery metadata supports time/temperature and incident investigation.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Cannot define exposure window or receiving condition
rules.Corrective Action: Add date/time/condition fields to receiving records.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Temperature abuse or contamination at receiving triggers M06 review.
rules.Question_AR: هل delivery date, time and receiving condition recorded for each lot?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Add date/time/condition fields to receiving records.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Cannot define exposure window or receiving condition

rules.Question: For imported materials/products, are import documents linked to lot identity and supplier/source?
rules.Requirement Logic: Import traceability should link shipment documents, origin, approvals and lot IDs.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Untraceable imported product or origin mismatch
rules.Corrective Action: Link import documents to internal lot/batch records.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Origin/source issue triggers M01/M08 investigation.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier; M06 receiving; regulatory engine
rules.Question_AR: For imported materials/products, are import documents linked to lot identity and supplier/source?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link import documents to internal lot/batch records.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Untraceable imported product or origin mismatch

rules.Question: Can each finished batch be linked to all raw material lots used?
rules.Requirement Logic: Finished batch genealogy must identify all raw material lot inputs and quantities.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Cannot identify affected finished batches from raw lot issue
rules.Corrective Action: Record material lot consumption by finished batch; reconcile quantities.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Raw lot hazard without finished link triggers broad hold/recall scope.
rules.Question_AR: Can each finished batch be linked to all raw material lots used?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Record material lot consumption by finished batch; reconcile quantities.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Cannot identify affected finished batches from raw lot issue

rules.Question: Are quantities of raw lots consumed and remaining reconciled against finished batch production?
rules.Requirement Logic: Quantity reconciliation supports complete affected-scope identification.
rules.Corrective Action: Reconcile raw used/remaining/waste/rework; investigate discrepancies.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Major discrepancy after hazard may trigger broad hold.
rules.Question_AR: هل quantities of raw lots consumed and remaining reconciled against finished batch production?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Reconcile raw used/remaining/waste/rework; investigate discrepancies.

rules.Question: Can each batch be linked to production line, machine/equipment ID and processing area?
rules.Requirement Logic: Machine/line linkage narrows investigations after equipment, cleaning or maintenance failures.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Cannot identify products affected by equipment-related issue
rules.Corrective Action: Record line/equipment IDs per batch/time window.

rules.Question_AR: Can each batch be linked to production line, machine/equipment ID and processing area?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Record line/equipment IDs per batch/time window.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Cannot identify products affected by equipment-related issue

rules.Question: Can each batch/line/shift be linked to workers and supervisors involved?

rules.Corrective Action: Record Worker ID, role, shift, line and time per batch.

rules.Question: Are cleaning/pre-op release records linked to the batches produced after the cleaning event?

rules.Question_AR: هل cleaning/pre-op release records linked to the batches produced after the cleaning event?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link cleaning event ID to batch start/end; hold if cleaning failed.

rules.Question: Are maintenance events linked to equipment, area, time window and batches produced before/after release?

rules.Question: Are pest incidents linked to affected area, time window, stock and batches?

rules.Question_AR: هل pest incidents linked to affected area, time window, stock and batches?

rules.HazardRisk_AR: Cannot identify products affected by pest activity

rules.Question: Are deviations linked to affected product batch, time window, line, material, worker and equipment?

rules.Question_AR: هل deviations linked to affected product batch, time window, line, material, worker and equipment?

rules.Question: Can rework be traced from original batch to final batch and vice versa?

rules.Question_AR: Can rework be traced from original batch to final batch and vice versa?

rules.Question: Can allergen-containing lots and final products be traced through shared lines, rework, labels and distribution?

rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 allergen controls; EU traceability support

rules.Question: Can packaging and label lots/codes be linked to finished product batches?

rules.Corrective Action: Record packaging/label lot by finished batch; quarantine mismatches.

rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 product information; EU traceability support

rules.Question: Can the business identify the direct business customer/recipient for each finished batch shipped?
rules.Requirement Logic: One-step-forward traceability requires identifying the business recipient of product lots.

rules.Question_AR: Can the business identify the direct business customer/recipient for each finished batch shipped?

rules.Question: Are customer contact details sufficient for urgent withdrawal/recall communication?
rules.Requirement Logic: Customer master data must allow rapid notification and confirmation.

rules.Question: Is each shipped quantity linked to finished batch, delivery date, customer and destination?

rules.Question_AR: هل produced, stored and shipped quantities reconciled for affected batches?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Reconcile all quantities; investigate discrepancies before closing recall/hold.

rules.Question: Where product is sent to distributors, is there a mechanism to request onward distribution data rapidly?
rules.Requirement Logic: Distributors must be able to provide onward distribution information for recall effectiveness.

rules.Corrective Action: Add recall data terms to customer agreements; test response.

rules.Question: For exported products, are export documents linked to batch, destination, consignee and regulatory documents?

rules.Question: Is there a documented recall/withdrawal procedure with decision criteria, responsibilities, contacts and records?

rules.Question_AR: Is a recall team and emergency contact list maintained and tested?

rules.Question: Is there a method to classify events as hold, withdrawal, recall, authority notification or customer notification?
rules.Requirement Logic: Event classification must be risk-based and documented.

rules.Question: Can the system generate a list of affected customers, quantities, dates and contacts for an affected batch/material/deviation?

rules.Question_AR: Can the system generate a list of affected customers, quantities, dates and contacts for an affected batch/material/deviation?

rules.Question_AR: Is potentially affected product placed on hold while risk assessment/traceability is performed?

rules.Question_AR: هل recall/withdrawal communication templates available for customers, authorities and internal teams?

rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Correct shipment/customer data gaps; retest.

rules.Question: Does mock recall test internal links: raw lot, batch, line, machine, worker, cleaning, deviation and rework?
rules.Requirement Logic: Internal test validates advanced genealogy beyond one-step-back/forward.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Internal source or affected scope cannot be identified
rules.Corrective Action: Close gaps in genealogy tables and repeat test.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Internal trace failure weakens targeted recall and disposition decisions.
rules.Question_AR: هل mock recall test internal links: raw lot, batch, line, machine, worker, cleaning, deviation and rework?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Close gaps in genealogy tables and repeat test.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Internal source or affected scope cannot be identified

rules.Question: Are mock recall performance indicators measured: time to trace, completeness, accuracy and corrective actions?
rules.Requirement Logic: Mock recall must measure effectiveness, not just completion.
rules.Corrective Action: Set targets; improve data flow; assign CAPA.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Severe performance failure may require system redesign.
rules.Question_AR: هل mock recall performance indicators measured: time to trace, completeness, accuracy and corrective actions?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Set targets; improve data flow; assign CAPA.

rules.Question: Are corrective actions from mock recall closed and verified?
rules.Requirement Logic: Mock recall findings must lead to verified improvements.
rules.Corrective Action: Close CAPA; retest weak areas.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Open critical traceability CAPA escalates master risk.
rules.Question_AR: هل corrective actions from mock recall closed and verified?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Close CAPA; retest weak areas.

rules.Question: Are mandatory traceability fields enforced before release/dispatch?
rules.Requirement Logic: Critical fields such as batch, material lot, customer, quantity, date/time and status must not be blank.
rules.Corrective Action: Block release/dispatch until mandatory fields are complete.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Missing critical traceability fields prevent release.
rules.Question_AR: هل mandatory traceability fields enforced before release/dispatch?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Block release/dispatch until mandatory fields are complete.

rules.Question: Are changes to traceability and recall-critical records captured in audit trail?
rules.Requirement Logic: Critical record changes must capture old value, new value, user, date/time and reason.
rules.Corrective Action: Enable audit trail; restrict deletion; investigate unauthorized changes.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Audit trail failure weakens legal defense and release decisions.
rules.Question_AR: هل changes to traceability and recall-critical records captured in audit trail?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Enable audit trail; restrict deletion; investigate unauthorized changes.

rules.Question: Are hold/release/recall statuses protected from unauthorized overwrite?
rules.Requirement Logic: Product status changes must require authorization and retain history.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unauthorized product release or recall status manipulation
rules.Corrective Action: Restrict status changes; require QA approval and reason.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unauthorized release status change triggers investigation/hold.
rules.Question_AR: هل hold/release/recall statuses protected from unauthorized overwrite?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Restrict status changes; require QA approval and reason.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Unauthorized product release or recall status manipulation

rules.Question: Are backdated traceability entries flagged and reviewed?
rules.Requirement Logic: Late/backdated entries can be allowed only with reason and approval; must remain visible.
rules.Corrective Action: Flag, review and approve late entries; investigate patterns.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Backdating critical hold/release data may escalate to Critical.
rules.Question_AR: هل backdated traceability entries flagged and reviewed?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Flag, review and approve late entries; investigate patterns.

rules.Question: Are users authorized by role for traceability, release and recall actions?
rules.Requirement Logic: Role-based access prevents unauthorized edits, release or recall closure.
rules.Corrective Action: Define roles and permissions; review periodically.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unauthorized release/recall action escalates to Critical.
rules.Question_AR: هل users authorized by role for traceability, release and recall actions?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Define roles and permissions; review periodically.

rules.Question: Are traceability and recall records backed up and exportable during emergency?
rules.Requirement Logic: Critical recall data must be accessible during system failure or investigation.
rules.Corrective Action: Implement backup/export; test recovery.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No access during recall may escalate response failure.
rules.Question_AR: هل traceability and recall records backed up and exportable during emergency?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Implement backup/export; test recovery.

rules.Question: Can customer complaints be linked to product batch, production records and distribution history?
rules.Requirement Logic: Complaints must feed traceability and investigation logic.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Complaint cannot identify affected lots or root cause
rules.Corrective Action: Link complaint to batch/customer/production data; investigate trends.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Safety complaint may trigger recall classification.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M06 deviation; M07 evidence; Recall Engine
rules.Question_AR: Can customer complaints be linked to product batch, production records and distribution history?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link complaint to batch/customer/production data; investigate trends.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Complaint cannot identify affected lots or root cause

rules.Question: Are returned products identified, segregated, traceable and assessed before any disposition?
rules.Requirement Logic: Returns must not re-enter stock or rework without assessment and traceability.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unsafe returned product reused or mixed
rules.Corrective Action: Quarantine returns; assess disposition; prevent unauthorized re-entry.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Uncontrolled return may trigger recall/product hold.
rules.Question_AR: هل returned products identified, segregated, traceable and assessed before any disposition?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Quarantine returns; assess disposition; prevent unauthorized re-entry.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Unsafe returned product reused or mixed

rules.Question: Can withdrawn products be linked to affected batch and customer response/recovered quantities?
rules.Requirement Logic: Withdrawal requires same reconciliation and response tracking as recall when product has left control.
rules.Corrective Action: Track recovered quantities and close with reconciliation.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unverified withdrawal closure = system failure.
rules.Question_AR: Can withdrawn products be linked to affected batch and customer response/recovered quantities?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Track recovered quantities and close with reconciliation.

rules.Question: For dairy, can raw milk source, tanker, farm/supplier, test results and finished dairy batches be linked?
rules.Requirement Logic: Dairy traceability should link raw milk receiving lots/tankers to processing batches and finished products.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Milk hazard source or affected products unclear
rules.Required Evidence: Milk receiving records, test results, batch genealogy
rules.Corrective Action: Link farm/supplier/tanker/test results to finished batches.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Aflatoxin/antibiotic/pathogen issue triggers M01/M06/M08 scope.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier; M06 dairy receiving; Recall Engine
rules.Question_AR: For dairy, can raw milk source, tanker, farm/supplier, test results and finished dairy batches be linked?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link farm/supplier/tanker/test results to finished batches.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Milk hazard source or affected products unclear
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Milk receiving records, test results, batch genealogy

rules.Question: For meat/poultry, can raw lot, slaughter/source data where applicable, processing line, cook lot and finished batch be linked?
rules.Requirement Logic: Meat traceability should preserve raw-to-cooked and source-to-finished linkage.
rules.Corrective Action: Link raw lots to cook lots/finished products and customers.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Raw/cooked cross-contamination or cook failure triggers M06/M08.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M06 meat cook/cool; M05 zoning; Recall Engine
rules.Question_AR: For meat/poultry, can raw lot, slaughter/source data where applicable, processing line, cook lot and finished batch be linked?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link raw lots to cook lots/finished products and customers.

rules.Question: For fish, are species, lot, supplier/source, ice/cold chain and dispatch records linked to finished/shipped batch?
rules.Requirement Logic: Fish traceability should support safety, species/origin and cold chain investigation.
rules.Corrective Action: Link fish lots, temp/ice records and shipments.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Cold chain or source issue triggers M06/M08.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M06 fish temp; M02 ice; Recall Engine
rules.Notes: Can be expanded with fish-specific EU requirements later.
rules.Question_AR: For fish, are species, lot, supplier/source, ice/cold chain and dispatch records linked to finished/shipped batch?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link fish lots, temp/ice records and shipments.

rules.Question: For grains/spices/dry foods, can supplier lot, moisture/mycotoxin testing, storage location and finished batches be linked?
rules.Requirement Logic: Dry commodity traceability must support mycotoxin or stored-product insect investigations.
rules.Required Evidence: Test records, storage records, batch genealogy
rules.Corrective Action: Link supplier lot/testing/storage location to finished products.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Aflatoxin/moisture/infestation issue triggers M01/M04/M06/M08.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier; M04 pest; M06 moisture
rules.Question_AR: For grains/spices/dry foods, can supplier lot, moisture/mycotoxin testing, storage location and finished batches be linked?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link supplier lot/testing/storage location to finished products.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Test records, storage records, batch genealogy

rules.Question: For RTE products, are post-lethality handling, environmental monitoring, workers, cleaning and distribution linked?
rules.Requirement Logic: RTE traceability should identify exposure windows and environmental/personnel links.
rules.Required Evidence: EMP, cleaning, worker, batch, shipment records
rules.Corrective Action: Link RTE batches to EMP/cleaning/worker/line/time/customer records.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Listeria/EMP/personnel event triggers targeted recall review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 EMP; M05 worker; M06 post-lethality; Recall Engine
rules.Question_AR: For جاهز للاستهلاك (RTE) products, are post-lethality handling, environmental monitoring, workers, cleaning and distribution linked?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link RTE batches to EMP/cleaning/worker/line/time/customer records.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: EMP, cleaning, worker, batch, shipment records

rules.Question: For allergen incidents, can affected batches/customers be identified by ingredient, line, label and rework usage?
rules.Requirement Logic: Allergen traceability must support rapid label correction/withdrawal/recall decisions.
rules.Corrective Action: Generate allergen affected-product/customer list; verify labels and rework.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Allergen incident triggers Label Engine/M08 recall decision.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M03 allergen cleaning; M06 label/rework; Label Engine
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 allergen/product info; EU traceability support
rules.Question_AR: For allergen incidents, can affected batches/customers be identified by ingredient, line, label and rework usage?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Generate allergen affected-product/customer list; verify labels and rework.

rules.Question: For composite foods, are animal-origin ingredients, supplier approvals, processing status and finished product shipments traceable?
rules.Requirement Logic: Composite products need traceability of key animal-origin ingredients and their source/approval evidence for export/import readiness.
rules.Required Evidence: Ingredient source docs, supplier approvals, batch genealogy
rules.Corrective Action: Link animal-origin ingredients and compliance evidence to finished product/shipment.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Regulatory nonconformity may trigger hold/export review.
rules.Linked Module Impact: M01 supplier; M06 receiving; export/regulatory engine
rules.Notes: Not a single EU checklist; this creates readiness data layer.
rules.Question_AR: For composite foods, are animal-origin ingredients, supplier approvals, processing status and finished product shipments traceable?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Link animal-origin ingredients and compliance evidence to finished product/shipment.
rules.RequiredEvidence_AR: Ingredient source docs, supplier approvals, batch genealogy

rules.Question: Is product release blocked if traceability records are incomplete or invalid?
rules.Requirement Logic: Finished product release must depend on valid traceability and required records.
rules.Corrective Action: Block release until traceability validation passes.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Release without traceability = product hold/recall risk.
rules.Question_AR: Is product release blocked if traceability records are incomplete or invalid?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Block release until traceability validation passes.

rules.Question: Does unsafe or potentially unsafe product status automatically trigger recall/withdrawal assessment if distributed?
rules.Requirement Logic: If product may be unsafe and has left control, recall/withdrawal assessment must be initiated.
rules.Product / Process Trigger: Product distributed or may be distributed
rules.Corrective Action: Run forward trace and recall classification; hold remaining stock.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unsafe distributed product triggers recall decision workflow.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: EU 178/2002 unsafe food obligations; CXC recall
rules.Question_AR: هل unsafe or potentially unsafe product status automatically trigger recall/withdrawal assessment if distributed?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Run forward trace and recall classification; hold remaining stock.

rules.Question: Is untraceable product treated as nonconforming until assessed?
rules.Requirement Logic: Product lacking required traceability must not be released as normal product.
rules.Corrective Action: Hold and assess; reject/rework/relabel only if justified and compliant.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Untraceable product cannot pass normal release gate.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 documentation/recall support; EU traceability obligations
rules.Question_AR: Is untraceable product treated as nonconforming until assessed?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Hold and assess; reject/rework/relabel only if justified and compliant.

rules.Question: If affected scope cannot be narrowed, does the system expand hold/recall scope conservatively?
rules.Requirement Logic: When data cannot narrow scope, the system must expand to all potentially affected product.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unsafe product missed due to narrow assumption
rules.Corrective Action: Expand hold/recall scope to last verified safe point.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Unknown scope after critical event triggers broad hold/recall.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 corrective action/recall; EU food safety responsibility
rules.Question_AR: If affected scope cannot be narrowed, does the system expand hold/recall scope conservatively?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Expand hold/recall scope to last verified safe point.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Unsafe product missed due to narrow assumption

rules.Question: Are traceability fields structured for database/API use rather than free text only?
rules.Requirement Logic: Electronic traceability requires structured keys, controlled lists and relational links.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Unusable data for automated recall engine
rules.Corrective Action: Standardize fields and controlled vocabularies.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Free-text critical data weakens automation and trace speed.
rules.Question_AR: هل traceability fields structured for database/API use rather than free text only?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Standardize fields and controlled vocabularies.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Unusable data for automated recall engine

rules.Question: Are M01–M07 records cross-referenced using stable IDs?
rules.Requirement Logic: Cross-module records must connect through stable IDs: material, batch, line, worker, machine, record, deviation.
rules.Corrective Action: Implement stable ID links between modules and records.
rules.HACCP Trigger: No cross-reference prevents Level C traceability.
rules.Question_AR: هل M01–M07 records cross-referenced using stable IDs?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Implement stable ID links between modules and records.

rules.Question: Can the system generate a traceability report for a batch, raw lot, customer, deviation or worker?
rules.Requirement Logic: The platform should output trace reports that support decisions and audits.
rules.Hazard / Risk: Manual trace too slow or incomplete
rules.Corrective Action: Build report outputs and validate accuracy through tests.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Report failure during incident may escalate.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 documentation/recall support; EU traceability support
rules.Question_AR: Can the system generate a traceability report for a batch, raw lot, customer, deviation or worker?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Build report outputs and validate accuracy through tests.
rules.HazardRisk_AR: Manual trace too slow or incomplete

rules.Question: Can the system produce an evidence package for authority/customer investigation?
rules.Requirement Logic: Evidence package should include affected product, trace, records, actions, disposition and CAPA.
rules.Corrective Action: Generate package; review and approve before sharing.
rules.HACCP Trigger: Critical events require complete legal evidence.
rules.Codex / EU Reference: CXC 1-1969 documentation; EU official controls context
rules.Question_AR: Can the system produce an evidence package for authority/customer investigation?
rules.CorrectiveAction_AR: Generate package; review and approve before sharing.

Sick worker or critical behavior breach = Critical
