cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: M06 Operational; M07 Documentation; M08 Traceability; HACCP
cross_module_links.Impacted Module: Receiving becomes unreliable; raw material release cannot depend on supplier controls.
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Activate receiving HACCP review; require SOP-SUP-01 and hold/release controls.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.no_supplier_approval

cross_module_links.Impacted Module: Receiving cannot make consistent acceptance/rejection decisions.
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Block material release until specifications are created.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.no_spec

cross_module_links.Link ID: No feed aflatoxin control for dairy
cross_module_links.Impacted Module: Aflatoxin M1 risk may need receiving CCP/OPRP.
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Require M1 testing and HACCP trigger.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.dairy.feed_aflatoxin_missing

cross_module_links.Impacted Module: Veterinary residue risk uncontrolled at source.
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Require residue testing/hold and supplier CAPA.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.withdrawal_missing

cross_module_links.Link ID: No heavy metal assessment in risk area
cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: M06 Receiving; HACCP Chemical; M07 Verification
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Require heavy metal testing plan and source reassessment.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.heavy_metal_uncontrolled

cross_module_links.Impacted Module: Cold-chain hazard affects specific batch and traceability.
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Hold batch; investigate time/temp; trace affected lots.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.transport_temp_dev

cross_module_links.Impacted Module: Supplier equipment/transport may contaminate incoming material.
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Increase receiving inspection and require supplier SSOP evidence.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.supplier_cleaning_fail

cross_module_links.Impacted Module: Pest contamination risk enters raw material.
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Require corrective action and incoming inspection.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.supplier_pest_fail

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: System fail until traceability is restored.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.batch_trace_missing

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: M08 Traceability; EU Audit; Label Compliance
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Hold material and require full source declaration.
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: event.m01.composite_unknown_source

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Supplier/receiving area exposes raw materials to contamination
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Receiving controls become insufficient; supplier/receiving risk must be reviewed
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Activate receiving corrective action and possible raw material hold

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Cleaning, personnel flow and operational zoning must be reviewed
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Trigger high hygiene assessment and post-process contamination review

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Waste may contaminate surfaces/products and increase pest pressure
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Trigger cleaning verification, pest trend review and affected batch trace

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Environmental contamination may affect product and equipment
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Stop/hold affected product; clean/disinfect; trace batches

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Utility failure can affect multiple batches and records
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Identify affected time window and batches; hold until risk assessed

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Condensate may directly contaminate product/contact surfaces
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold affected product; verify sanitation and trace production time

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Personnel hygiene controls are unreliable
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Restrict open food handling until corrected; retrain staff

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Raw, chemical or allergen contamination/mix-up possible
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Quarantine affected materials/products; verify traceability and labels

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Operational control records may be invalid
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Assess products since last valid monitoring/calibration

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: New hazards may be introduced without review
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Trigger change control and HACCP plan review

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: No documented SSOP or missing cleaning program
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Documentation failure undermines all GMP evidence
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Block GMP approval until SSOP and records exist

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Production may have occurred on contaminated surfaces
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold affected batches by line/time; trace production window

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Cleaning tools cross zones or drains to food surfaces
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Facility zoning and staff practices are ineffective
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Retrain staff; dedicate tools; review zoning and affected products

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Food-contact sanitation may be ineffective or residues possible
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Reclean/retest; assess affected batches if production occurred

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Closed system product path may be contaminated over time window
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold batches since last valid CIP; validate and document

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Positive EMP/pathogen finding in high-risk area
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Environmental contamination may affect product and facility design
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Investigate, intensify cleaning, trace product exposure, review facility niches

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Undeclared allergen risk may affect finished products
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold/relabel/recall affected lots; revise cleaning/scheduling

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Training, documentation or method design may be weak
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: CAPA, retraining, method validation, master risk escalation

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Maintenance contamination can affect production
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Stop/release procedure; trace product since maintenance

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Cleaning records not linked to batch/shift/time
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Recall scope cannot be narrowed after sanitation deviation
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Add batch/time/line fields; integrate traceability table

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Facility design/prevention failure
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Trigger M02 building/door corrective action

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Drain or standing water pest activity
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Drainage/cleaning/moisture source issue
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Review drainage, clean drains, remove water source

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Waste design/removal and sanitation failure
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Improve waste route/removal and sanitation frequency

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Supplier/receiving and stock traceability issue
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Quarantine raw lots; review supplier; trace affected products

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Pest evidence in food-contact/RTE/finished product areas
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Product exposure and sanitation release issue
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold affected product; clean/release area; trace batches

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Pesticide use or chemical treatment in food area
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Chemical control and release records required
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Verify chemical approval, clean/release, trace exposed product

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: No records, missing device IDs, missed inspections
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Monitoring evidence unreliable
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Correct record system and audit completion

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: System effectiveness failure requiring root cause
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Increase controls, investigate source, update risk level

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Outsourced control not effective
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: CAPA contractor; review SLA; escalate risk

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Recall/hold scope cannot be narrowed
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Add batch/time linkage; broad hold if uncertain

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: No functional handwashing / poor handwashing behavior
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Infrastructure/use failure affects food handling
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Fix station, retrain, restrict handling until controlled

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Product exposure and batch impact assessment required
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Identify line/shift/batches; hold/assess affected product

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Foreign body/biological contamination risk
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Stop line, search/hold affected product, trace batches

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Zoning, cleaning and product exposure risk
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Review layout, clean/release, hold affected RTE product

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Undeclared allergen risk
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold/trace/relabel/recall if allergen exposure possible

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Operational control and documentation weakness
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Restrict task, retrain, assess product if task performed

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Traceability cannot narrow product impact
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Add Worker ID/line/shift/batch fields; broad hold if incident occurs

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Access and post-work hygiene release risk
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Control access, brief, escort, clean/release if needed

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Systemic hygiene culture weakness
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Targeted training, supervision, escalation

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Foreign matter product impact assessment
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Search/hold/trace affected product window

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Receiving control failure/high-risk raw material issue
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Supplier/receiving risk and material traceability affected
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold material, review supplier, activate receiving CCP/OPRP logic

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Critical process control deviation affects product disposition
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold affected batch/window; assess release/rework/reject
cross_module_links.Example Rule IDs: OPR-011 to OPR-014, OPR-017 to OPR-022

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Facility, sanitation and personnel controls become product-impact factors
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Trace affected line/time; clean/release; review personnel and zoning

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Potential undeclared allergen and labeling noncompliance
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold/trace/relabel/recall review; validate cleaning/changeover

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Source/final batch and formulation/label risk
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Quarantine rework/final product; verify compatibility and traceability

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Line clearance or label verification failure
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Wrong product/label/packaging risk
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold affected production since last good check; label reconciliation

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Deviation without disposition or unclear impact window
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Affected product scope cannot be determined
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Apply broader hold; complete disposition and traceability records

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Operational records may be unreliable
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold/review products monitored since last valid calibration

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Storage/dispatch conditions and forward traceability affected
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold affected stock; review customers/distribution where needed

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Training/supervision/procedure/equipment weakness
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: CAPA, retraining, engineering review, management review

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Supplier approval and receiving release cannot be trusted
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold raw/finished products using unknown lots; update supplier/receiving records

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Affected finished batches cannot be identified from raw lot hazard
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold broad production scope until genealogy rebuilt

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Equipment or sanitation failure cannot be traced to batches
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Link cleaning/equipment/time records; hold broad window if incident occurs

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Illness or hygiene incident cannot define affected product
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Add worker-to-batch tracking; broaden hold after worker incident

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Product disposition cannot be justified
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Apply broad hold from last verified safe point; complete evidence

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Wrong label or packaging issue cannot identify affected batches/customers
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Hold affected label/packaging lots and finished products

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Affected customers cannot be notified
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Block release/dispatch process until forward trace restored

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Recall cannot be closed with evidence
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Track responses and quantities; continue follow-up until reconciled

cross_module_links.Finding / Trigger: Audit trail missing for traceability records
cross_module_links.Impact Logic: Legal defensibility/data integrity weak
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: Enable audit trail and restrict critical status edits

cross_module_links.Impact Logic: System cannot prove recall readiness
cross_module_links.Suggested System Action: CAPA and retest; escalate GMP maturity risk
